Question: Who holds the UFC record for most wins with 27?
Fact: Jim Miller holds the UFC record with 27 wins inside the Octagon, making him the winningest fighter in UFC history. The durable lightweight has competed for well over a decade against the best in the division.

Question: Who did Brock Lesnar exact revenge against at UFC 100?
Fact: Lesnar dominated and stopped Mir by TKO at UFC 100 avenging his submission loss from UFC 81 in front of one of the largest UFC crowds ever assembled.

Question: Who did Ronda Rousey fight in her UFC debut at UFC 157?
Fact: Rousey submitted Carmouche with an armbar in the first round at UFC 157 to win the inaugural UFC women's bantamweight title in her promotional debut.

Question: Who did Lyoto Machida defeat at UFC 98 to become champion?
Fact: Machida knocked out Evans in the second round at UFC 98 with his signature karate style to claim the light heavyweight title and extend his unbeaten record.

Question: Who is the only fighter to have victories over Rafael dos Anjos, Tony Ferguson, and Carlos Condit?
Fact: Chiesa holds wins over all three elite lightweights: dos Anjos by submission at UFC Fight Night 174 (2020), Ferguson by unanimous decision at UFC 262 (2021), and Condit by unanimous decision at UFC 232 (2018), making him the only fighter to have beaten all three.

Question: Who handed Jon Jones his only UFC loss by disqualification?
Fact: Jones was disqualified for repeatedly landing illegal downward elbows giving Hamill the technical victory. It remains the only loss on Jones UFC record and occurred before he ever won the championship.

Question: Which fighter is nicknamed The Spider?
Fact: Silva held the UFC middleweight title for over 2400 days making him one of the greatest champions in UFC history.

Question: After knocking out Yoshihiro Akiyama at UFC 133 and submitting Anthony Johnson at UFC 142, who challenged Jon Jones for the Light Heavyweight title at UFC 152?
Fact: Belfort arrived at UFC 152 on momentum, having finished both Akiyama and Johnson impressively. Jones submitted him with a keylock (Americana) in the fourth round to retain his title in a fight Jones himself later called his most challenging to that point.

Question: Who did Demetrious Johnson defeat to win the inaugural UFC flyweight championship?
Fact: Johnson defeated Benavidez by split decision at UFC on Fox 2 in January 2012 to become the first flyweight champion.

Question: Who is the only fighter to hold wins over Rafael Dos Anjos, Renan Barao, and Gilbert Melendez?
Fact: Stephens holds victories over former UFC lightweight champion dos Anjos, former UFC bantamweight champion Barao, and former Strikeforce lightweight champion Melendez — three former champions across multiple divisions. Despite this elite resume, Stephens never captured a UFC title himself.

Question: Which fighter is known by the nickname Stylebender?
Fact: Adesanya is a former kickboxing champion from New Zealand who brought his striking artistry to the UFC middleweight division.

Question: Who did Holly Holm knock out to win the UFC women's bantamweight title at UFC 193?
Fact: Holm landed a head kick in the second round to shock the world and end Rousey's dominant title reign in front of over 56000 fans in Melbourne.

Question: Who did Ronda Rousey defeat in 14 seconds at UFC 184 to record the fastest finish of her UFC career?
Fact: Rousey submitted Zingano with an armbar just 14 seconds into their fight at UFC 184 the fastest finish in UFC women's bantamweight history and the quickest win of Rousey's legendary title reign.

Question: Who holds the record for the fastest knockout in UFC history?
Fact: Masvidal knocked out Ben Askren in just 5 seconds at UFC 239 with a flying knee setting the all-time UFC record.

Question: Who did Cris Cyborg defeat to win the inaugural UFC women's featherweight title?
Fact: Cyborg demolished Evinger in the third round at UFC 214 to claim the first ever UFC women's featherweight championship.

Question: Who won the very first UFC tournament at UFC 1 in 1993?
Fact: Gracie submitted all three opponents in one night to win UFC 1 introducing Brazilian jiu-jitsu to the world and forever changing combat sports.

Question: Which fighter is nicknamed The Notorious?
Fact: McGregor earned his nickname during his rise through the Irish MMA scene before becoming a two-division UFC champion.

Question: Who did Amanda Nunes defeat to win her first UFC bantamweight title?
Fact: Nunes stopped Tate in the first round at UFC 200 to begin one of the most dominant championship reigns in UFC history.

Question: Who did Khabib Nurmagomedov defeat to win the vacant UFC lightweight championship?
Fact: Khabib defeated Iaquinta by unanimous decision at UFC 223 in April 2018 to win the vacant lightweight title. Iaquinta stepped in on short notice after multiple opponents fell out, and pushed Khabib for five rounds despite being a significant underdog.

Question: What fighter was knocked out in 7 seconds at UFC 149 by Ryan Jimmo, and in the very next fight won by knockout in 14 seconds over Vinny Magalhaes at UFC 163?
Fact: Perosh holds the unique distinction of suffering one of the fastest knockouts in UFC history (7 seconds vs Jimmo at UFC 149) and then responding with one of the fastest knockouts of his own (14 seconds vs Magalhaes at UFC 163). The back-to-back quick finishes made him one of the most memorable light heavyweights of that era.

Question: Who did Robert Whittaker defeat by split decision in a rematch at UFC 225?
Fact: Whittaker edged Romero in a close split decision at UFC 225 in Chicago. Their first fight at UFC 213 had also been controversial with many scoring it for Romero.

Question: Which fighter is nicknamed Blessed?
Fact: Holloway is widely regarded as one of the greatest featherweights in UFC history with the most significant strikes landed in divisional history.

Question: Who did Max Holloway defeat to win the interim UFC featherweight championship?
Fact: Holloway defeated Pettis by TKO at UFC Fight Night 103 in December 2016 to win the interim featherweight title. He then unified it against Jose Aldo at UFC 212 in June 2017 to become undisputed champion.

Question: Who did Tony Ferguson defeat to win the interim UFC lightweight championship?
Fact: Ferguson submitted Lee with a triangle choke in the third round at UFC 216 to claim the interim lightweight title.

Question: Who did Carlos Condit defeat to win the interim UFC welterweight championship?
Fact: Condit defeated Diaz by unanimous decision at UFC 143 in a fight many felt Diaz had won earning him a shot at GSP.

Question: Who did Conor McGregor defeat by majority decision at UFC 202 in their welterweight rematch?
Fact: McGregor won the UFC 202 rematch against Diaz by majority decision in a five-round war. Diaz had submitted McGregor at UFC 196 in one of the biggest upsets in UFC history. Both earned Fight of the Night bonuses.

Question: Which fighter is nicknamed The Eagle?
Fact: Khabib retired undefeated at 29-0 after submitting Justin Gaethje at UFC 254 and dedicated the win to his late father.

Question: Who did Tito Ortiz defeat at UFC 25 to win the vacant UFC light heavyweight title?
Fact: Ortiz defeated Silva by unanimous decision at UFC 25 in May 2000 to win the vacant UFC light heavyweight title. The title was vacant after Frank Shamrock vacated it. Silva was 13-3 at the time entering the fight.

Question: At 43 years old, who knocked off Tim Sylvia to win the UFC Heavyweight Championship at UFC 68?
Fact: Couture came out of retirement at 43 to upset the heavily favored Sylvia at UFC 68 in Columbus, Ohio in March 2007. He dominated the much younger champion for five rounds, winning a unanimous decision to claim the heavyweight title for a third time.

Question: What fighter had this four-fight winning streak: Split Decision over John Dodson, KO over Aljamain Sterling, KO over Jimmie Rivera, and Submission over Raphael Assuncao?
Fact: Moraes went on a dominant run through the bantamweight division, defeating Sterling, Rivera, and Assuncao in succession to earn a UFC bantamweight title shot against Henry Cejudo at UFC 238, where he was stopped in round 3.

Question: Who did Khabib Nurmagomedov submit with a triangle choke in round 2 to defend his UFC lightweight title for the final time at UFC 254?
Fact: Khabib submitted interim champion Gaethje in round 2 at UFC 254, then announced his retirement in the Octagon. He finished 29-0, never losing a round in his final three fights.

Question: Which fighter is nicknamed DC?
Fact: Cormier is a former Olympic wrestler who became a two-division UFC champion holding titles at both light heavyweight and heavyweight.

Question: Debuting at TUF: Heavyweights Finale, who did Kimbo Slice defeat for his lone UFC victory by decision?
Fact: Kimbo Slice, the internet fighting sensation, made his only UFC win by defeating Alexander at The Ultimate Fighter: Heavyweights Finale in December 2009 via unanimous decision. It was his lone UFC victory before his contract ended.

Question: Who did Joanna Jedrzejczyk defeat to win her first UFC strawweight title?
Fact: Jedrzejczyk knocked out Esparza in the second round at UFC 185 to begin a dominant strawweight title reign.

Question: What fighter had this four-fight winning streak: KO over Scott Holtzman, Submission over Jeremy Stephens, TKO over Carlos Diego Ferreira, and Unanimous Decision over Arman Tsarukyan?
Fact: Gamrot went on this impressive run through the lightweight division to establish himself as one of the top contenders. His wins over Stephens, Ferreira, and Tsarukyan in particular showcased his elite grappling and well-rounded skillset.

Question: Who did Miesha Tate defeat to win the UFC women's bantamweight title?
Fact: Tate submitted Holm with a rear naked choke in the fifth round at UFC 196 in one of the most dramatic finishes in UFC history.

Question: Which fighter is nicknamed The Korean Zombie?
Fact: Jung earned his nickname for his relentless pressure and durability and is one of South Korea's most celebrated MMA fighters.

Question: Who did BJ Penn submit to win the UFC welterweight title at UFC 46?
Fact: Penn caught Hughes in a triangle armbar at UFC 46 to win the welterweight title becoming the first fighter to hold titles in two weight classes.

Question: Who did Jose Aldo defeat in his first UFC featherweight title defense after the WEC merger?
Fact: Aldo defeated Hominick by unanimous decision at UFC 129 in front of over 55000 fans in Montreal in one of the most attended UFC events ever held at the time.

Question: Who did Rose Namajunas defeat by split decision in a non-title strawweight rematch at UFC 251?
Fact: Namajunas defeated Andrade by split decision at UFC 251 in July 2020 on Fight Island in a non-title fight — Weili Zhang held the title at the time. Rose used her jiu-jitsu and movement to edge out the decision over the powerful Andrade.

Question: Who did Anderson Silva knock out with a front kick at UFC 126 to make one of the most memorable finishes of his title reign?
Fact: Silva landed a perfectly timed front kick to the chin of Belfort at UFC 126 in one of the most technically brilliant finishes in UFC history during his legendary middleweight title reign.

Question: Which fighter is nicknamed The Huntington Beach Bad Boy?
Fact: Ortiz was one of the most popular and controversial fighters of the early UFC era and held the light heavyweight title for three years.

Question: Who did Holly Holm knock out with a head kick in the third round at UFC Fight Night 111 in Singapore?
Fact: Holm knocked out Correia with a head kick at 1:09 of round 3 at UFC Fight Night 111 in June 2017 in Singapore. This was Holm's first fight after losing the bantamweight title to Miesha Tate, and she was not the champion at the time of this bout.

Question: Who is the only fighter to defeat Chad Mendes twice in the UFC?
Fact: Aldo defeated Mendes twice — first at WEC 48 in 2010 and then in a rematch at UFC 142 in January 2012 — making him the only fighter to beat Mendes twice. Mendes later earned two title shots against Aldo for the featherweight crown.

Question: Ineligible to win the interim Middleweight title due to missing weight, who did Yoel Romero knock out at UFC 221?
Fact: Romero missed weight and was ineligible to win the interim middleweight title at UFC 221, but he stopped Rockhold with a brutal knockout in round 3 in February 2018. Had Romero made weight, he would have been crowned interim champion.

Question: Who did Israel Adesanya knock out in the second round to unify the UFC middleweight title at UFC 243?
Fact: Adesanya finished Whittaker in the second round at UFC 243 in Melbourne in front of over 57000 fans in one of the most anticipated middleweight title fights in years.

Question: Who did Jon Jones defeat to win his first UFC light heavyweight title at UFC 128?
Fact: Jones stopped Rua by TKO in the third round becoming the youngest UFC champion in history at just 23 years old.

Question: Who did Chuck Liddell knock out at UFC 66 to make his fourth UFC light heavyweight title defense?
Fact: Liddell knocked out Ortiz in round 3 at UFC 66 in December 2006 in their rematch, making his fourth consecutive light heavyweight title defense. The event drew over 1 million PPV buys, the first UFC event to reach that milestone.

Question: Who did Rose Namajunas defeat to win her first UFC strawweight title?
Fact: Namajunas knocked out Jedrzejczyk in the first round at UFC 217 in one of the most shocking upsets in women's MMA history.

Question: Aside from BJ Penn and Georges St-Pierre, who is the only fighter to defeat Matt Hughes twice?
Fact: Hallman defeated Hughes twice in regional competition early in their careers, making him the only fighter outside of Penn and GSP to beat Hughes twice. The losses were both early in Hughes' career before he became the dominant UFC welterweight champion.

Question: Who did Jon Jones put to sleep with a standing guillotine choke in the second round at UFC 140 to make his second light heavyweight title defense?
Fact: Jones dominated Machida in round 2 at UFC 140 in Toronto, catching his attempted takedown and locking in a tight standing guillotine that put Machida unconscious with 34 seconds left in the round. It is considered one of the most spectacular finishes in light heavyweight history.

Question: Which fighter is nicknamed The Lionheart?
Fact: Smith earned his reputation as one of the most durable and determined fighters in the light heavyweight division.

Question: Who did Jon Jones submit in the fourth round to make his first UFC light heavyweight title defense at UFC 135?
Fact: Jones dominated Rampage for four rounds at UFC 135 in Denver, using his reach and wrestling before locking in a rear naked choke in round 4. Jackson attempted to roll out but Jones stayed with him until the tap.

Question: Who did Tyron Woodley defeat to win the UFC welterweight championship?
Fact: Woodley knocked out Lawler in the first round at UFC 201 to win the welterweight title in stunning fashion.

Question: Defeating Brendan Allen for the inaugural LFA Middleweight title, what undefeated fighter defeated Rafael Natal by first-round knockout at UFC on Fox: Weidman vs. Gastelum?
Fact: Anders had won the inaugural LFA Middleweight Championship before making his UFC debut, where he knocked out veteran Natal in round 1 at UFC on Fox: Weidman vs. Gastelum in July 2017. He went on to compile a solid UFC record at middleweight and light heavyweight.

Question: Who holds the record for most wins by knockout in UFC history?
Fact: Lewis surpassed the record previously held by Chuck Liddell to become the UFC's all-time leader in knockout victories earning him the nickname The Black Beast.

Question: Which fighter is nicknamed The Nigerian Nightmare?
Fact: Usman made the most welterweight title defenses in UFC history surpassing the record set by Georges St-Pierre.

Question: Who did Kamaru Usman defeat to win his first UFC welterweight title?
Fact: Usman dominated Woodley over five rounds at UFC 235 to win the welterweight championship and begin a historic title reign.

Question: Who knocked out Mirko Cro Cop with a head kick at UFC 70 earning a heavyweight title shot?
Fact: Gonzaga knocked out the feared Cro Cop with his own signature weapon — a head kick — at UFC 70 in one of the biggest upsets in heavyweight history earning a shot at Randy Couture's title.

Question: Who is the only fighter to defeat Fedor Emelianenko twice?
Fact: Bader defeated Fedor twice in Bellator — first by KO in round 1 at Bellator 214 in January 2019 to win the Bellator Heavyweight Championship, and again in their rematch. He is the only fighter to have beaten Fedor more than once across his legendary career.

Question: Who did GSP defeat to win his first UFC welterweight title at UFC 65?
Fact: GSP defeated the dominant champion Hughes at UFC 65 avenging his previous loss and beginning one of the greatest welterweight title reigns in UFC history.

Question: Which fighter is nicknamed The Prodigy?
Fact: Penn was one of the most naturally gifted fighters in UFC history winning titles at both lightweight and welterweight.

Question: Who did TJ Dillashaw defeat to win the UFC bantamweight title in a major upset at UFC 173?
Fact: Dillashaw stopped the previously unbeaten Barao in the fifth round in one of the biggest upsets in bantamweight history showcasing footwork and timing that baffled the champion.

Question: Who did Luke Rockhold defeat to win his first UFC middleweight title?
Fact: Rockhold knocked out Weidman in the fourth round at UFC 194 to win the middleweight championship in impressive fashion.

Question: Who did Khabib Nurmagomedov submit in the third round to win his UFC debut at UFC on FX 1?
Fact: Khabib submitted Shalorus with a rear naked choke in round 3 at UFC on FX 1 in January 2012, beginning his unbeaten UFC run. He went on to go 13-0 in the UFC before retiring as lightweight champion.

Question: Who was the first UFC fighter to hold world titles in two weight classes simultaneously?
Fact: McGregor became the first simultaneous two-division UFC champion when he defeated Eddie Alvarez for the lightweight title at UFC 205 while holding the featherweight title. He held both belts at the same time, a first in UFC history.

Question: Which fighter is nicknamed Killa B?
Fact: Ben Saunders earned the nickname Killa B during his UFC career as a welterweight and middleweight known for his dynamic striking and submission skills. He competed in the UFC across two stints and was known for his exciting fighting style.

Question: Who did Francis Ngannou knock out in the first round at UFC 218 to earn his heavyweight title shot?
Fact: Ngannou demolished Overeem with a left uppercut in round 1 at UFC 218 in December 2017 in Detroit. The ferocious finish earned him an immediate title shot against Stipe Miocic and announced him as the most dangerous puncher in heavyweight history.

Question: Who did Glover Teixeira defeat to win the UFC light heavyweight championship at UFC 267?
Fact: Teixeira won the light heavyweight title at age 41 at UFC 267, submitting Blachowicz in round 5 in Abu Dhabi. He later lost the title to Jiri Prochazka via a rear naked choke submission in the final seconds of their UFC 275 fight.

Question: What fighter had this four-fight winning streak: TKO over Karl Roberson, Split Decision over Dustin Jacoby, TKO over Chris Daukaus, and TKO over Anthony Smith?
Fact: Rountree went on this winning streak through the light heavyweight division to earn a UFC light heavyweight title shot. His four consecutive finishes showcased his power and finishing ability as one of the most dangerous strikers at 205 pounds.

Question: Who did Cain Velasquez defeat by TKO to win his first UFC heavyweight title at UFC 121?
Fact: Velasquez dominated Lesnar with relentless striking and takedowns, stopping him in the first round at UFC 121 in October 2010. It was Cain's first heavyweight title win, ending Lesnar's title reign.

Question: Which fighter is nicknamed Bones?
Fact: Jones earned the nickname Bones due to his lanky physique with long limbs that give him a significant reach advantage.

Question: Who did Dominick Cruz defeat by unanimous decision at UFC on Versus 6 to make his second UFC bantamweight title defense?
Fact: Cruz defeated Johnson by unanimous decision at UFC on Versus 6 in October 2011, his second UFC bantamweight title defense. Cruz had already become champion by defeating Urijah Faber at UFC 132 in his first defense.

Question: Who did Jon Jones defeat in his sixth light heavyweight title defense at UFC 165 to break the divisional record?
Fact: Jones defeated Gustafsson by unanimous decision at UFC 165 in his sixth title defense breaking Tito Ortiz's record for most consecutive light heavyweight title defenses. Many observers felt Gustafsson had won the fight.

Question: Who is the only fighter to hold wins over Luke Rockhold and Israel Adesanya?
Fact: Blachowicz holds victories over former UFC middleweight champions Rockhold and Adesanya. He submitted Rockhold at UFC Fight Night 141 and defeated Adesanya at UFC 259 in his first light heavyweight title defense, making him the only fighter to have beaten both men.

Question: Who did Robbie Lawler defeat to win his first UFC welterweight title?
Fact: Lawler defeated Hendricks by split decision in their rematch at UFC 181 to win the welterweight championship.

Question: Which fighter is nicknamed Gamebred?
Fact: Masvidal earned his nickname from his street fighting background in Miami where he competed in backyard fights as a teenager.

Question: Who did Zhang Weili knock out in 42 seconds to win the UFC strawweight title at UFC Fight Night 157?
Fact: Zhang knocked out the champion Andrade with a barrage of punches in just 42 seconds at UFC Fight Night 157 in Shenzhen, China in August 2019, becoming the first Chinese UFC champion. The finish was one of the most shocking title changes in strawweight history.

Question: Who did Cody Garbrandt defeat by unanimous decision to win the UFC bantamweight title at UFC 207?
Fact: Garbrandt defeated the seemingly invincible Cruz at UFC 207 in December 2016, knocking him down multiple times with crisp boxing. The win ended Cruz's 1000-day title reign.

Question: What fighter had this four-fight winning streak: KO over Jon Fitch, Split Decision over Josh Koscheck, KO over Martin Kampmann, and Unanimous Decision over Carlos Condit?
Fact: Hendricks went on a remarkable run through the welterweight division's best, defeating Fitch, Koscheck, Kampmann, and Condit in succession to earn a UFC welterweight title shot against Georges St-Pierre at UFC 167, where he arguably won the fight but lost a controversial split decision.

Question: Which fighter is nicknamed The Last Stylebender?
Fact: Adesanya took the Stylebender nickname from the anime Avatar The Last Airbender as a nod to his fluid striking style.

Question: Who did Stipe Miocic defeat by TKO in the first round to win his first heavyweight title at UFC 198?
Fact: Miocic stormed Werdum in the first round at UFC 198 in Brazil stopping the champion with ground and pound to begin his historic run as the most decorated heavyweight champion in UFC history.

Question: Who did TJ Dillashaw defeat to win back the UFC bantamweight title at UFC 217?
Fact: Dillashaw knocked out Garbrandt in the third round of their rematch at UFC 217 to reclaim the bantamweight title he had previously vacated.

Question: Who was the first fighter to knock out Anderson Silva in the UFC?
Fact: Weidman knocked out Silva in the second round at UFC 162 ending Silva's historic 2457 day title reign in one of the biggest upsets in UFC history.

Question: What fighter knocked out Charles Oliveira at UFC 152, then followed it up with a decision victory over Dustin Poirier at UFC on Fuel TV 7?
Fact: Swanson stopped Oliveira by TKO at UFC 152 in September 2012 and then defeated Poirier by unanimous decision at UFC on Fuel TV 7 in February 2013. The back-to-back wins over two future champions announced Swanson as a legitimate featherweight contender.

Question: Which fighter is nicknamed Showtime?
Fact: Pettis earned fame for his acrobatic fighting style including the famous wall-walk kick against Benson Henderson.

Question: A former safety for Stony Brook University, what fighter nearly defeated Jon Jones at UFC 247?
Fact: Reyes, who played safety at Stony Brook University, put on an outstanding performance against Jones at UFC 247 in February 2020, with many scoring the fight for Reyes. Jones retained the title by split decision in one of the closest fights of his career.

Question: Who did Eddie Alvarez defeat to become the UFC lightweight champion at UFC Fight Night 90?
Fact: Alvarez dominated dos Anjos from the opening bell stopping him in the first round to win the lightweight title and set up his blockbuster fight with Conor McGregor.

Question: Who did Aljamain Sterling defeat by split decision to win his first official UFC bantamweight title defense at UFC 273?
Fact: Sterling defeated Yan by split decision at UFC 273 in April 2022, avenging the disqualification loss in their first fight. Two judges scored it for Sterling, one for Yan, in a close fight that Sterling controlled with his grappling.

Question: Who is the only fighter to hold wins over Belal Muhammad and Tyron Woodley?
Fact: Luque defeated Muhammad by submission at UFC 260 in 2019 and finished Woodley in round 1 at UFC 260 in March 2021. He remains the only fighter to have beaten both Muhammad, who went on to become UFC welterweight champion, and former champion Woodley.

Question: Which UFC fighter is a former Olympic gold medalist in freestyle wrestling?
Fact: Cejudo won Olympic gold at the 2008 Beijing Games before transitioning to MMA and winning two UFC world titles.

Question: Which fighter is nicknamed The Count?
Fact: Bisping became the first British UFC champion and is now a popular television personality and UFC commentator.

Question: Who did Michael Bisping defeat by unanimous decision at UFC Fight Night 84 in London?
Fact: Bisping defeated Silva 48-47 on all three judges' scorecards at UFC Fight Night 84 in London in February 2016. The fight went the full five rounds in a close contest that saw Silva drop Bisping with a flying knee at the end of round 3 after the bell had effectively rung.

Question: Who did Leon Edwards defeat to win his first UFC welterweight title?
Fact: Edwards knocked out Usman with a stunning head kick in the fifth round at UFC 278 to win the welterweight title.

Question: Who did Yoel Romero knock out in the third round in his UFC debut at UFC Fight Night 31?
Fact: Romero knocked out Markes with knees and punches at 1:39 of round 3 in his UFC debut at UFC Fight Night 31 (Fight for the Troops 3) in December 2013. His second UFC fight was a victory over Derek Brunson at UFC Fight Night 35 in January 2014.

Question: Who did Dustin Poirier defeat by knockout in round 4 at UFC on Fox 29 in one of the most explosive lightweight bouts of 2018?
Fact: Poirier knocked out Gaethje in round 4 at UFC on Fox 29 in April 2018 in a brutal back-and-forth brawl. Both men were rocked multiple times before Poirier landed the finishing blow. The fight earned Fight of the Night honors.

Question: Which fighter is nicknamed The Baby Assassin?
Fact: O'Malley earned the nickname The Baby Assassin early in his career for his flashy, precise striking style and finishing ability despite his young age. He went on to win the UFC bantamweight championship at UFC 292 by knocking out Aljamain Sterling.

Question: Who did Petr Yan defeat to win the interim UFC bantamweight championship?
Fact: Yan defeated Sandhagen by unanimous decision at UFC 267 to win the interim bantamweight title.

Question: Not counting fighters promoted to Champion, following the Strikeforce purchase, who was the first Strikeforce fighter to capture UFC gold?
Fact: After Zuffa purchased Strikeforce in 2011, Ronda Rousey was promoted directly as UFC women's bantamweight champion without fighting. Lawler, a former Strikeforce welterweight champion, earned his UFC title by defeating Johny Hendricks at UFC 181 in December 2014, making him the first to win UFC gold through competition following the purchase.

Question: Who is the only fighter to hold wins over both Dan Severn and Randy Couture?
Fact: Barnett defeated Severn early in his career and then beat Couture to win the UFC heavyweight title at UFC 36 in March 2002, albeit the title was later vacated after Barnett tested positive for steroids. He remains the only fighter to have beaten both Severn and Couture.

Question: Who did Demetrious Johnson submit with a flying armbar at UFC 216 to break the UFC record for consecutive title defenses?
Fact: Johnson's flying armbar finish of Borg at UFC 216 was his 11th consecutive title defense breaking Anderson Silva's record and standing as one of the most spectacular championship moments in UFC history.

Question: Which fighter is nicknamed The Diamond?
Fact: Poirier has established himself as one of the best lightweights of his generation and is known for his charitable work in Louisiana.

Question: Demetrious Johnson was famously traded by the UFC to ONE Championship for what fighter?
Fact: In a landmark deal in 2018, the UFC traded flyweight champion Demetrious Johnson to ONE Championship in exchange for Ben Askren, a former ONE welterweight champion and undefeated wrestler. Askren went on to be knocked out in five seconds by Jorge Masvidal at UFC 239.

Question: Who did Charles Oliveira defeat to win the vacant UFC lightweight championship?
Fact: Oliveira submitted Chandler via rear naked choke in round 2 at UFC 262 to claim the vacant lightweight title. He was coming off 9 consecutive finishes and had been overlooked as a title contender for years despite his remarkable submission record.

Question: Who is the only fighter to hold wins over Thiago Alves, Rafael Dos Anjos, and Rory MacDonald?
Fact: Tibau holds victories over three fighters who all went on to become top welterweight and lightweight contenders — Alves, dos Anjos, and MacDonald — making him one of the most underrated opponents of elite talent in UFC history despite never reaching title contention himself.

Question: Who did Alexandre Pantoja defeat to win the UFC flyweight championship at UFC 290?
Fact: Pantoja defeated Moreno by unanimous decision at UFC 290 to win the flyweight title completing a remarkable rise from Ultimate Fighter contestant to world champion.

Question: Which fighter is nicknamed The Highlight?
Fact: Gaethje earned his nickname for his exciting brawling style and his willingness to stand and trade with any opponent.

Question: Who defeated Valentina Shevchenko to end her first UFC flyweight title reign at Noche UFC?
Fact: Grasso submitted Shevchenko via rear naked choke in round 4 at Noche UFC in September 2023, ending Shevchenko's dominant first flyweight title reign at seven defenses. Their rematch at UFC 285 ended in a controversial majority draw, with Shevchenko winning the trilogy.

Question: Who did Tom Aspinall knock out at UFC 304 to make his first UFC interim heavyweight title defense?
Fact: Aspinall stopped Blaydes with punches in round 2 at UFC 304 in Manchester in July 2024, making his first interim title defense in front of a home crowd. The fight put further pressure on undisputed champion Jon Jones to return.

Question: Before losing to Conor McGregor at UFC Fight Night 126, who defeated Max Holloway via split decision at UFC 160?
Fact: Bermudez defeated a young Holloway by split decision at UFC 160 in May 2013, handing him one of his early UFC losses. Holloway went on to become the UFC featherweight champion, while Bermudez later lost to McGregor at UFC Fight Night 126 in February 2018.

Question: Which fighter is nicknamed Smile'n?
Fact: Sam Alvey earned the nickname Smile'n due to his perpetually cheerful demeanor and constant smile, even in the heat of battle. The light heavyweight and middleweight veteran was known as one of the most likable personalities on the UFC roster throughout his career.

Question: Who did Rashad Evans knock out to win the UFC light heavyweight title at UFC 92?
Fact: Evans knocked out Griffin with a right hand in the second round at UFC 92 to win the light heavyweight title in a dominant display of his boxing power.

Question: Who did Alexander Volkanovski defeat to win the UFC featherweight championship at UFC 245?
Fact: Volkanovski defeated Holloway by unanimous decision at UFC 245 in December 2019, ending Holloway's 14-fight winning streak. He went on to defeat Holloway twice more, establishing himself as one of the greatest featherweights of all time.

Question: Joining the UFC in 2010, what undefeated fighter nabbed wins over Darren Elkins and Efrain Escudero before losing to Jim Miller?
Fact: Oliveira entered the UFC undefeated and looked promising with early wins before struggling through a difficult stretch mid-career. He lost to Miller in 2012 and went on to lose several more before turning his career around to become one of the most dominant lightweight champions in UFC history.

Question: What fighter had this four-fight winning streak: Unanimous Decision over Kendall Grove, Unanimous Decision over Nick Pace, TKO over Yushin Okami, and Split Decision over Hector Lombard?
Fact: Boetsch went on this impressive middleweight run, with his TKO of the previously unbeaten Okami being the highlight. The streak established him as a legitimate contender in the division and earned him a place among the top middleweights during his tenure.

Question: Who did Carla Esparza defeat to win the inaugural UFC women's strawweight title on The Ultimate Fighter 20 finale?
Fact: Esparza defeated Namajunas by rear naked choke to win the first ever UFC strawweight title at The Ultimate Fighter 20 finale beginning a new era for women's MMA in the UFC.

Question: Who did Conor McGregor defeat at UFC 194 in 13 seconds?
Fact: McGregor's knockout of Aldo in 13 seconds remains one of the most shocking moments in UFC history ending Aldo's decade-long unbeaten run.

Question: Who did Frankie Edgar defeat to win the UFC lightweight title at UFC 112?
Fact: Edgar defeated Penn by unanimous decision at UFC 112 in Abu Dhabi in a massive upset to win the lightweight championship proving his relentless style could outwork any opponent.

Question: Who did Conor McGregor stop in the second round at UFC 189 to win the interim UFC featherweight title?
Fact: McGregor stopped Mendes with ground-and-pound at 4:57 of round 2 at UFC 189 in Las Vegas. Mendes had rocked McGregor early but McGregor's superior striking and conditioning carried him to the finish.

Question: Who is the only fighter to record wins over both Sean Strickland and Benoit Saint-Denis?
Fact: Zaleski dos Santos holds victories over both Strickland (before his middleweight title run) and Saint-Denis, making him the only fighter to have beaten both men. The Brazilian welterweight is one of the most underrated finishers in the division.

Question: Which fighter is nicknamed The Axe Murderer?
Fact: Silva was one of the most feared strikers in MMA history during his time in Pride FC before joining the UFC.

Question: Who did Luke Rockhold defeat at UFC 194 to become UFC middleweight champion?
Fact: Rockhold knocked out Weidman in the fourth round at UFC 194 in a stunning upset that ended Weidman's title reign and signaled a new era for the middleweight division.

Question: Who did Georges St-Pierre submit to win the UFC middleweight title at UFC 217?
Fact: GSP came out of a four-year retirement to challenge champion Bisping at UFC 217, submitting him with a rear naked choke in round 3. It was his first fight since 2013 and he won a title in a new weight class, becoming a two-division champion.

Question: Who did TJ Dillashaw defeat at UFC 227 to retain the UFC bantamweight title?
Fact: Dillashaw dominated the rematch against Garbrandt at UFC 227 in August 2018, stopping him in round 1 to retain his bantamweight title. He had won their first fight at UFC 217 and the rematch was even more one-sided.

Question: What fighter had this four-fight winning streak: Submission over Trevor Smith, Unanimous Decision over Roger Gracie, KO over Rafael Natal, and Unanimous Decision over Michael Bisping?
Fact: Kennedy went on a strong run through the middleweight division defeating Smith, Gracie, Natal, and Bisping to earn a shot at the Strikeforce middleweight title against Luke Rockhold. He later joined the UFC where he continued to compete at the highest level.

Question: Who did Robert Whittaker defeat to win his first UFC middleweight title?
Fact: Whittaker defeated Romero by split decision at UFC 213 to win the interim middleweight title which was later upgraded to undisputed.

Question: Who did Johny Hendricks defeat by split decision to win the UFC welterweight title at UFC 171?
Fact: Hendricks defeated Lawler by split decision at UFC 171 to win the welterweight title in a rematch of their earlier fight setting up a second bout between the two warriors.

Question: What fighter was a perfect 16-0, with eight straight wins in the UFC before falling short against Georges St-Pierre for the welterweight title at UFC 87?
Fact: Fitch entered UFC 87 undefeated at 16-0 after winning his first eight UFC fights, establishing himself as the top welterweight contender. GSP dominated the fight from start to finish, winning by unanimous decision in what remains one of the most lopsided title fights in welterweight history.

Question: Who did Germaine de Randamie defeat to win the inaugural UFC women's featherweight title at UFC 208?
Fact: De Randamie defeated Holm by majority decision at UFC 208 to become the first ever UFC women's featherweight champion before the title was later vacated.

Question: After losing to Vitor Belfort in his UFC debut, who did Luke Rockhold knock out at UFC Fight Night 35 to score his first UFC victory?
Fact: Rockhold lost to Belfort via head kick KO in his UFC debut at UFC on FX 8. He rebounded with a second-round TKO of Philippou at UFC Fight Night 35 in January 2014, beginning his climb toward the middleweight title which he captured at UFC 194.

Question: Who did Benson Henderson defeat by unanimous decision at UFC on Fox 5 to make his first UFC lightweight title defense?
Fact: Henderson made his first title defense against Diaz at UFC on Fox 5 in December 2012, winning by unanimous decision. Diaz had many fans thinking he had won, but the judges favored Henderson's wrestling and control time.

Question: Who did Kamaru Usman defeat to win his fourth UFC welterweight title defense at UFC 261?
Fact: Usman knocked out Masvidal in the second round at UFC 261 in front of fans for the first time during the pandemic era cementing his status as the dominant welterweight champion.

Question: Who did Dricus du Plessis defeat at UFC 305 to make his first UFC middleweight title defense?
Fact: Du Plessis defeated Adesanya by split decision at UFC 305 in Perth to retain his middleweight title in front of a huge crowd making his first successful championship defense.

Question: Who did Frankie Edgar defeat by KO at UFC 136 in their third fight?
Fact: Edgar knocked out Maynard in round 4 at UFC 136 in October 2011, winning their trilogy. Their first fight at UFC 125 was a draw, their second at UFC 130 went to Maynard via TKO before Edgar mounted a comeback. The third fight saw Edgar land the decisive finish to close out the rivalry.

Question: Who defeated Brendan Schaub by knockout in the main event of TUF: Heavyweights Finale?
Fact: Nelson knocked out Schaub in the third round to win The Ultimate Fighter: Heavyweights season finale in December 2009. The win launched Nelson's UFC career and was considered one of the biggest knockouts of that year.

Question: Which fighter is nicknamed The Dragon?
Fact: Machida was the first karate practitioner to win a UFC world title and his elusive style baffled opponents throughout his career.

Question: Who did Yair Rodriguez finish with a last-second elbow at UFC Fight Night 139 in one of the most dramatic endings in UFC history?
Fact: Rodriguez caught Jung with a spinning back elbow with just one second remaining in round 5 at UFC Fight Night 139 in November 2018 in Denver. Jung had been dominating the fight before the stunning last-second finish.

Question: Who did Darren Till defeat to earn his UFC welterweight title shot at UFC Fight Night 130?
Fact: Till dominated Thompson over five rounds at UFC Fight Night 130 in Liverpool, England in May 2018, earning a unanimous decision and a welterweight title shot against Tyron Woodley. The hometown performance made Till a star in the UK.

Question: Who did Stipe Miocic defeat by unanimous decision at UFC 220 to break the record for most consecutive heavyweight title defenses?
Fact: Miocic dominated Ngannou over five rounds at UFC 220 to win by unanimous decision and set the UFC record for most consecutive heavyweight title defenses with three.

Question: What WEC Light Heavyweight champion closed out the trilogy by decision against Steve Cantwell at UFC Fight Night: Diaz vs. Guillard?
Fact: Stann had won the WEC Light Heavyweight Championship and brought it into the UFC after the merger. He defeated Cantwell by unanimous decision in their trilogy fight at UFC Fight Night: Diaz vs. Guillard in January 2011, closing out their series.

Question: Who did Merab Dvalishvili defeat to win the UFC bantamweight championship at UFC 306?
Fact: Dvalishvili dominated O'Malley with relentless wrestling pressure at UFC 306 in Las Vegas to win the bantamweight title and fulfill years of hard work alongside his training partner Aljamain Sterling.

Question: Who did Yoel Romero fight twice in back-to-back middleweight title fights?
Fact: Romero fought Whittaker twice for the middleweight title losing both fights by split decision in two of the most brutal and competitive bouts in division history.

Question: Who defeated Julianna Pena by unanimous decision at UFC 277 to reclaim the UFC women's bantamweight title?
Fact: Nunes dominated the rematch with Pena at UFC 277 in Dallas, winning by scores of 50-45, 50-44, and 50-43 to reclaim the bantamweight title. She dropped Pena three times in round 2 on her way to the dominant win.

Question: Who did Chuck Liddell KO to win his first UFC light heavyweight title rematch at UFC 52?
Fact: Liddell knocked out Couture in the second round at UFC 52 to win the light heavyweight title and avenge his earlier loss setting up a legendary rivalry that defined an era.

Question: What fighter had this four-fight winning streak: Unanimous Decision over John Moraga, TKO over TJ Dillashaw, Unanimous Decision over Tim Elliott, and TKO over Jussier Formiga?
Fact: Dodson went on this impressive flyweight run, with his win over Dillashaw being particularly notable as Dillashaw went on to become UFC bantamweight champion. Dodson's speed and power made him one of the most exciting flyweights during his UFC tenure.

Question: Who did Glover Teixeira submit to win the UFC light heavyweight title at UFC 267?
Fact: Teixeira submitted Blachowicz in the second round at UFC 267 to win the light heavyweight title at 42 years old becoming one of the oldest first-time UFC champions in history.

Question: Who did Amanda Nunes defeat to become the first woman to be a two-division UFC champion?
Fact: Nunes knocked out Cyborg in the first round at UFC 232 to become the undisputed women's featherweight champion alongside her bantamweight title.

Question: Who did Henry Cejudo defeat by TKO to win the vacant UFC bantamweight title at UFC 238?
Fact: Cejudo stopped Moraes with a barrage of punches and elbows in round 3 at UFC 238 in June 2019 to win the vacant bantamweight title. He had vacated the flyweight title after winning it, becoming a simultaneous two-division champion before announcing his retirement.

Question: Who did Deiveson Figueiredo defeat to win his first UFC flyweight championship?
Fact: Figueiredo submitted Benavidez in the second round at UFC Fight Night 169 to win the vacant flyweight championship.

Question: Who is the only fighter to hold wins over Jared Cannonier and Derrick Lewis?
Fact: Jordan holds victories over both Cannonier and Lewis, two fighters who went on to have significant UFC careers at heavyweight and middleweight. The wins are among the most notable of Jordan's UFC tenure as a durable heavyweight contender.

Question: Who did Ciryl Gane defeat by TKO at UFC 265 to win the interim UFC heavyweight title?
Fact: Gane dominated Lewis with his Muay Thai and movement, stopping him in round 3 at UFC 265 in August 2021 to win the interim heavyweight title. He then faced Francis Ngannou for the undisputed title at UFC 270 but lost by unanimous decision.

Question: Which fighter is nicknamed Bullet?
Fact: Shevchenko is from Bishkek Kyrgyzstan and is a former world Muay Thai champion who became one of the most dominant UFC champions.

Question: Who did Joanna Jedrzejczyk defeat by TKO in the third round to make her first UFC strawweight title defense at UFC Fight Night 69 in Berlin?
Fact: Jedrzejczyk stopped Penne with punches and a knee at 4:22 of round 3 in Berlin, earning Fight of the Night in her first title defense. Both fighters were awarded Fight of the Night bonuses.

Question: Who did Francis Ngannou knock out at UFC 218 in a heavyweight title eliminator?
Fact: Ngannou destroyed Overeem with a left uppercut in round 1 at UFC 218 in December 2017, earning himself an immediate heavyweight title shot against Stipe Miocic. The finish was so spectacular it cemented Ngannou's reputation as the most dangerous puncher in UFC history.

Question: Who is the only fighter to hold wins over Fedor Emelianenko and Derrick Lewis?
Fact: Mitrione defeated Fedor by TKO in round 1 at Bellator 172 in January 2017 and also holds a win over Derrick Lewis from their time together in the UFC. He is the only fighter to have beaten both the legendary Fedor and the UFC's all-time KO record holder.

Question: Who did Rose Namajunas defeat by split decision at UFC 268 to retain the UFC strawweight title?
Fact: Namajunas retained the strawweight title against Zhang by split decision at UFC 268 in November 2021 in New York. It was a close rematch of their UFC 261 fight where Rose had knocked Zhang out in round 1 to reclaim the title.

Question: Who did Georges St-Pierre defeat in his UFC debut?
Fact: GSP defeated Parisyan by unanimous decision at UFC 46 in January 2004 beginning one of the greatest careers in UFC history.

Question: Who did Colby Covington defeat by decision to win the interim UFC welterweight title at UFC 225?
Fact: Covington dominated dos Anjos over five rounds at UFC 225 in June 2018, winning by unanimous decision to claim the interim welterweight title. He was later stripped of the interim title without a fight when the UFC declined to make the unification bout with Tyron Woodley at the time.

Question: Who did Dricus du Plessis defeat by TKO at UFC 290 to earn his UFC middleweight title shot?
Fact: Du Plessis stopped Whittaker via TKO at UFC 290 in July 2023, earning the middleweight title shot. The two met again after Du Plessis won the title, with du Plessis defending against Whittaker at UFC 305.

Question: Who did Georges St-Pierre defeat to make his fourth UFC welterweight title defense at UFC 111?
Fact: GSP dominated Hardy across all five rounds at UFC 111 but was unable to finish him. Hardy became the first British fighter to challenge for a UFC title and refused to tap despite being caught in an armbar and a kimura.

Question: Who did Dricus du Plessis defeat by split decision to win the UFC middleweight title at UFC 297?
Fact: Du Plessis defeated Strickland at UFC 297 in Toronto to become the first South African UFC champion in a close and competitive five round battle.

Question: Which fighter is nicknamed Platinum?
Fact: Perry is known for his aggressive brawling style and colorful personality having competed in both the UFC and bare-knuckle boxing.

Question: Who did Forrest Griffin defeat in the light heavyweight final of The Ultimate Fighter Season 1 before Dana White gave both fighters UFC contracts?
Fact: Griffin won a razor-close three-round fight with Bonnar at TUF 1 Finale on April 9, 2005. Dana White was so impressed he gave both fighters UFC contracts on the spot — widely credited as the moment that launched the UFC's mainstream success.

Question: Who did Cain Velasquez defeat by TKO at UFC 160 in his first title defense of his second reign?
Fact: Velasquez won his second title reign at UFC 155, then made his first defense of that second reign at UFC 160 in May 2013, stopping Big Foot Silva with strikes in round 5. It was Cain's first title defense of his second championship run after reclaiming the belt from Junior dos Santos.

Question: Who did Junior dos Santos KO in the first round to win the UFC heavyweight title at UFC on Fox 1?
Fact: Dos Santos landed a right hand that put Velasquez down at UFC on Fox 1 in just 64 seconds to win the heavyweight title in one of the most shocking upsets in division history.

Question: Who did Anderson Silva defeat to win his first UFC middleweight title?
Fact: Silva knocked out Franklin with devastating knees in the clinch at UFC 64 to begin his legendary championship reign.

Question: Who did Carla Esparza defeat to win the UFC strawweight title for the second time at UFC 274?
Fact: Esparza defeated Namajunas by unanimous decision at UFC 274 using her wrestling to neutralize Namajunas's striking and win back the title she had originally won on TUF 20.

Question: Who did BJ Penn submit in the second round with a rear naked choke to win the vacant UFC lightweight title at UFC 80?
Fact: Penn defeated Stevenson at UFC 80 in January 2008, winning the vacant lightweight title. Penn dominated the fight with crisp striking and relentless ground-and-pound before finishing with an RNC.

Question: Who did Cheick Kongo score an insane comeback knockout victory over at UFC on Versus 4?
Fact: Barry had Kongo nearly finished multiple times and looked moments away from stopping the fight when Kongo landed a wild right hand that floored Barry. Kongo finished with ground strikes in one of the most remarkable heavyweight comeback knockouts in UFC history at UFC on Versus 4 in June 2011.

Question: Who is the only fighter to hold victories over both Randy Couture and Alistair Overeem?
Fact: Liddell knocked out Overeem in the Pride 2003 middleweight Grand Prix quarterfinals, and also defeated Couture twice in their title trilogy at UFC 52 and UFC 57. No other fighter holds wins over both men, making Liddell uniquely positioned across both promotions' heavyweight legends.

Question: Who is the only fighter to hold wins over both Phil Baroni and Chris Weidman?
Fact: Tavares defeated Baroni by TKO in the first round in 2011 and scored an upset split decision over former UFC middleweight champion Weidman in 2018, making him the only fighter to have wins over both men. Tavares has been a durable and consistent UFC middleweight throughout his career.

Question: Which fighter is nicknamed Rampage?
Fact: Jackson earned his Rampage nickname for his explosive fighting style including his signature slam finishes popularized in Pride FC.

Question: Who did Quinton Jackson defeat by unanimous decision at UFC 75 to unify the UFC light heavyweight title?
Fact: Jackson defeated Pride middleweight champion Henderson by unanimous decision at UFC 75 in London in September 2007, unifying the UFC and Pride light heavyweight titles. Henderson had entered as the underdog but gave Jackson a tough five rounds.

Question: What former UFC lightweight champion ended his career with seven consecutive losses?
Fact: Penn returned to fight numerous times after his prime, losing his final seven UFC bouts in a row. Despite ending his career with a long losing streak, Penn is considered one of the greatest lightweights in UFC history, having been the first simultaneous two-division UFC champion.

Question: What fighter had this four-fight winning streak: Unanimous Decision over Mike Perry, TKO over Preston Parsons, Unanimous Decision over Kevin Lee, and Split Decision over Li Jingliang?
Fact: Rodriguez went on this impressive welterweight run to establish himself as a top contender in the division. His wins over Perry and Lee in particular showcased his striking and toughness, making him one of the more exciting welterweights during his UFC tenure.

Question: Who did Justin Gaethje stop by TKO in the fifth round to win the interim UFC lightweight title at UFC 249?
Fact: Gaethje finished Ferguson with a barrage of leg kicks and punches in round 5 at UFC 249 in May 2020, winning the interim lightweight title. Ferguson had been on a 12-fight winning streak entering the fight. Gaethje's calculated leg kick assault was widely praised as a masterclass in fight strategy.

Question: Who did Dan Henderson famously knock out at UFC 100?
Fact: Henderson knocked Bisping unconscious with a massive overhand right in round 2 at UFC 100 in July 2009, then controversially jumped on the downed fighter for an extra shot. The highlight-reel knockout is one of the most celebrated in UFC history.

Question: Who did Islam Makhachev knock out to make his second UFC lightweight title defense at UFC 294?
Fact: Makhachev knocked out Volkanovski in round 1 at UFC 294 in Abu Dhabi in October 2023, finishing their rematch by KO after Volkanovski had put on a closer performance in their UFC 284 fight. Volkanovski had again taken the fight on short notice.

Question: Who did Khabib Nurmagomedov dominate by unanimous decision at UFC 219 to earn his UFC lightweight title shot?
Fact: Khabib dominated Barboza completely at UFC 219 in December 2017, scoring 30-25 on all three judges' cards. The performance, which saw Khabib control Barboza on the mat for nearly all 15 minutes, earned him the Performance of the Night bonus and finally secured him a title shot.

Question: Who is the only fighter to hold wins over Fabricio Werdum, Mirko Cro Cop, and Travis Browne?
Fact: Oleinik holds victories over former UFC heavyweight champion Werdum, Pride legend Cro Cop, and Travis Browne across his long career. The Russian submission specialist is one of the most durable and experienced heavyweights in MMA history with over 70 professional fights.

Question: Who did Kevin Lee defeat at UFC Fight Night 112 to earn an interim lightweight title fight?
Fact: Lee submitted Chiesa with a rear naked choke in round 5 at UFC Fight Night 112 in June 2017, earning an interim lightweight title fight against Tony Ferguson. The win was controversial as Lee missed weight, but the result stood and he went on to fight Ferguson.

Question: Who did Alexander Volkanovski defeat by unanimous decision at UFC 276 to make his fourth featherweight title defense?
Fact: Volkanovski edged Holloway in their trilogy fight at UFC 276 in July 2022, winning a unanimous decision to retain his featherweight title for the fourth time. The trilogy solidified Volkanovski's status as an all-time great featherweight.

Question: Who did Conor McGregor knock out in the first round at UFC on Fuel TV 9 to make his highly anticipated UFC debut?
Fact: McGregor knocked out Brimage with a flurry of strikes at 1:07 of the first round at UFC on Fuel TV 9 in April 2013, earning Knockout of the Night in his promotional debut. He had previously held both the Cage Warriors featherweight and lightweight titles.

Question: Who did Dominick Cruz defeat by unanimous decision at UFC 199 in their trilogy fight to make his final bantamweight title defense?
Fact: Cruz completed the trilogy against his longtime rival Faber at UFC 199, winning by unanimous decision to retain his title. It was Faber's last shot at the bantamweight title after three failed attempts against Cruz.

Question: What fighter had this four-fight winning streak: Split Decision over Aljamain Sterling, Split Decision over Marlon Moraes, KO over Matthew Lopez, and Unanimous Decision over Rob Font?
Fact: Sandhagen went on this impressive bantamweight run, defeating three fighters who all went on to championship contention — Sterling (future champion), Moraes (former title challenger), and Font — to establish himself as the top contender in the division.

Question: Which fighter is nicknamed Big Nog?
Fact: Nogueira is a Brazilian legend famous for his world-class Brazilian jiu-jitsu and his incredible ability to survive punishment and submit opponents.

Question: Who did Cain Velasquez defeat by TKO to win back the UFC heavyweight title and win the trilogy at UFC 166?
Fact: Velasquez stopped Junior dos Santos in round 5 at UFC 166 in October 2013 to win the trilogy and reclaim the heavyweight title. After losing his title to JDS at UFC on Fox 1, Cain won the rematch at UFC 155 and completed the trilogy at UFC 166.

Question: Who did Alistair Overeem defeat at UFC 141 in his UFC debut?
Fact: Overeem made his UFC debut at UFC 141 in December 2011, knocking out Lesnar in round 1 with a combination of body kicks and punches. The win over the former UFC heavyweight champion announced Overeem as a serious title contender immediately.

Question: Who did Valentina Shevchenko defeat by unanimous decision at UFC on Fox 23 to earn a UFC flyweight title shot?
Fact: Shevchenko defeated Pena by unanimous decision at UFC on Fox 23 in January 2018, earning her flyweight title shot. She went on to dominate Joanna Jedrzejczyk at UFC 231 to win the inaugural flyweight championship.

Question: Who is the only fighter to hold wins over Rich Franklin and Frank Shamrock?
Fact: Le defeated Frank Shamrock by TKO in round 3 at Strikeforce in March 2008 to win the Strikeforce Middleweight Championship, then knocked out Rich Franklin in the first round at UFC on Fuel TV 6 in November 2012. He is the only fighter to hold wins over both men.

Question: Who did Rashad Evans defeat by controversial split decision at UFC 78 to earn his UFC light heavyweight title shot?
Fact: Evans edged Bisping 2-1 on the judges' scorecards at UFC 78 in a fight most felt was very close. Two judges gave it to Evans, one to Bisping. Evans went on to win the light heavyweight title at UFC 92 by knocking out Forrest Griffin.

Question: Who is the only fighter to defeat Lyoto Machida twice?
Fact: Davis defeated Machida twice: by split decision at UFC on Fox 4 in 2012, and again at Bellator 179 in 2017 by unanimous decision. He is the only fighter to have beaten Machida twice across their careers.

Question: Who did Demetrious Johnson defeat by unanimous decision at UFC on Fox 24 to tie Anderson Silva's record for consecutive UFC title defenses?
Fact: Johnson defeated Reis by unanimous decision at UFC on Fox 24 in April 2017, making his tenth consecutive flyweight title defense to tie Anderson Silva's record. He broke it with a flying armbar finish of Ray Borg at UFC 216.

Question: Who did Magomed Ankalaev defeat by TKO at UFC 277, ultimately earning a shot at the vacant light heavyweight title?
Fact: Ankalaev stopped Smith by TKO in round 2 at UFC 277 in July 2022, earning the light heavyweight title shot. He fought Jiri Prochazka for the vacant title at UFC 282 and the fight ended in a split draw, with both men leaving without the belt.

Question: Who did Anderson Silva defeat at UFC 82 to make his third UFC middleweight title defense?
Fact: Silva submitted Henderson with a rear naked choke in the second round at UFC 82 in a title unification bout against the Pride FC welterweight champion. It was Henderson's first loss in the UFC.

Question: Who did Cris Cyborg defeat at UFC 198 in her UFC debut?
Fact: Cyborg made her UFC debut at UFC 198 in Curitiba, Brazil in May 2016, stopping Smith via TKO in round 1. It was the first UFC women's featherweight bout and Cyborg was dominant, leading to her eventual inaugural UFC featherweight title win against Tonya Evinger.

Question: Who did Robbie Lawler defeat in a bloody five round war to make his first UFC welterweight title defense at UFC 195?
Fact: Lawler defeated Condit in a five round classic at UFC 195 in one of the most entertaining welterweight title fights in history with both men landing heavy shots throughout.

Question: Who did Kamaru Usman defeat via TKO to make his third UFC welterweight title defense?
Fact: Usman finished Burns via TKO in round 3 at UFC 258 in February 2021. Burns had landed some early offense and dropped Usman momentarily, but Usman recovered and dominated the remainder of the fight.

Question: Who did Paddy Pimblett defeat in his UFC debut at UFC Fight Night 193 after being knocked down early in the fight?
Fact: Pimblett was dropped early by Vendramini but came back to finish him by TKO in the first round at UFC Fight Night 193. The dramatic comeback made him an instant fan favourite in the UFC.

Question: Who is the only fighter to hold wins over both Iuri Alcantara and Renan Barao?
Fact: Kelleher defeated both of the Brazilian bantamweight standouts during his UFC tenure — beating Alcantara and former longtime UFC interim bantamweight champion Barao — making him the only fighter to hold wins over both men.

Question: A former Fight Night Global Heavyweight Champion, this future title contender lost his UFC debut to Alistair Overeem.
Fact: Pavlovich held the Fight Night Global Heavyweight Championship before joining the UFC, where he lost his debut to Overeem by TKO in round 1 at UFC Fight Night 130 in May 2018. He went on to win 9 straight UFC bouts, knocking out Tom Aspinall to become the interim heavyweight champion at UFC 295.

Question: Who did Quinton Jackson defeat to win the UFC light heavyweight title at UFC 71?
Fact: Jackson knocked out Liddell with a massive right hand at UFC 71 to win the light heavyweight title avenging a previous stoppage loss and cementing himself as a UFC champion.

Question: Who did Matt Hughes defeat by TKO in the first round to make his first UFC welterweight title defense at UFC 63?
Fact: Hughes dominated Penn in their rematch at UFC 63 in September 2006, stopping him with ground-and-pound in round 1 in his first title defense of his second reign. It was a one-sided rematch after their first meeting at UFC 46 went to Penn.

Question: Who did Weili Zhang dominate by unanimous decision at UFC 312 to make her third consecutive strawweight title defense?
Fact: Zhang dominated the previously unbeaten Suarez at UFC 312 in Sydney, outwrestling the elite wrestler and outstriking her 251-61 to win 49-46, 49-46, 49-45. Zhang successfully defended 14 of Suarez's 15 takedown attempts.

Question: Who did Cain Velasquez defeat by TKO in his second UFC fight at UFC Fight Night 14?
Fact: Velasquez stopped O'Brien in the first round at UFC Fight Night 14 to improve to 2-0 in the UFC. He went on to KO Nogueira to earn a shot at Brock Lesnar and won the UFC heavyweight title at UFC 121.

Question: Who did Henry Cejudo defeat by split decision to win the UFC flyweight title at UFC 227?
Fact: Cejudo defeated Johnson in one of the closest title fights in flyweight history at UFC 227 ending Johnson's record-setting 11-defense reign to become the new champion.

Question: What fighter went 31-1 (1 NC) to start his career, before losing to future UFC Heavyweight Champion Fabricio Werdum?
Fact: Fedor compiled a record of 31-1-1 NC before suffering a shock submission loss to Werdum at Strikeforce: Fedor vs. Werdum in June 2010. Werdum, who went on to win the UFC heavyweight title, caught the seemingly invincible Fedor in a triangle armbar.

Question: Who did Vicente Luque finish in the first round at UFC 260 in one of the most impressive performances of his career?
Fact: Luque finished Woodley in round 1 at UFC 260 in March 2021 in one of the most dominant performances of his career. The finish was so complete it shot Luque into the upper echelon of the welterweight division.

Question: Who did Amanda Ribas submit by armbar in the first round at UFC 251 on Fight Island?
Fact: Ribas submitted VanZant with an armbar at UFC 251 on Fight Island to remain undefeated in the UFC and position herself as a strawweight contender. She later earned a title shot against Rose Namajunas.

Question: What fighter had this four-fight winning streak: Unanimous Decision over Kevin Holland, TKO over Eryk Anders, KO over Jimi Manuwa, and TKO over Jan Blachowicz?
Fact: Santos went on this run through the light heavyweight division to earn a UFC light heavyweight title shot against Jon Jones at UFC 239. Despite fighting with torn ligaments in both knees suffered during the fight, Santos came close to defeating Jones in one of the closest title fights in divisional history.

Question: Who did Francis Ngannou knock out in the second round to win the UFC heavyweight title at UFC 260?
Fact: Ngannou finished Miocic with his devastating punching power in the second round at UFC 260 avenging his lopsided loss in their first fight and fulfilling his remarkable journey from poverty in Cameroon to world champion.

Question: Which fighter is nicknamed Bam Bam?
Fact: Tuivasa earned his nickname for his explosive knockout power and his love of celebrating wins by doing a shoey drinking from a shoe.

Question: Who did Jon Jones stop by TKO in the first round at UFC 159, equalling Tito Ortiz's record for most consecutive light heavyweight title defenses?
Fact: Jones stopped Sonnen with ground-and-pound at 4:33 of round 1 at UFC 159 in April 2013, making his fifth consecutive title defense to equal Tito Ortiz's divisional record. The fight was Sonnen's first appearance at light heavyweight.

Question: What former Bellator fighter is on a heater, winning seven consecutive fights, six by finish, with the last coming over David Onama at UFC Vegas 110?
Fact: Garcia transferred his Bellator experience to the UFC and went on a remarkable finishing streak, going 7-0 with six stoppages including a finish of Onama at UFC Vegas 110. His aggressive finishing style made him one of the most exciting featherweights on the roster.

Question: Who did Chris Lytle defeat via submission in his retirement fight at UFC on Versus 5?
Fact: Lytle submitted Hardy with a rear naked choke at UFC on Versus 5 in August 2011 in what he announced as his retirement fight. It was a fitting send-off for one of the UFC's most beloved fan favorites, known for his brawling style and always delivering exciting fights.

Question: Which kickboxing world champion came to the UFC and knocked out Israel Adesanya with the same punch that had stopped him twice in kickboxing?
Fact: Pereira had beaten Adesanya twice in kickboxing including a KO before they met in the UFC at UFC 281 where Pereira used the same left hook to win the middleweight title in the fifth round.

Question: Which fighter is nicknamed Durinho?
Fact: Burns earned his nickname which means Little Hard One in Portuguese and has become one of the top welterweight contenders in the UFC.

Question: Who did Joanna Jedrzejczyk challenge for the UFC strawweight title at UFC 248?
Fact: Zhang and Jedrzejczyk put on a five-round war at UFC 248 that is widely regarded as the greatest women's MMA fight ever contested.

Question: Who did Ronaldo Souza defeat via KO at UFC 230?
Fact: Souza knocked out former UFC middleweight champion Weidman in round 1 at UFC 230 in November 2018 at Madison Square Garden. The finish was one of the most significant of Souza's UFC career and ended Weidman's hopes of a title run.

Question: What fighter won five straight fights, with the fifth coming via TKO over Gray Maynard in a title eliminator, but never fought again due to a lingering concussion?
Fact: Grant finished Maynard in round 1 at UFC 160 in May 2013 to earn a lightweight title shot against Benson Henderson. However, he suffered a serious concussion and was never able to return to fighting, one of the great what-ifs in lightweight history.

Question: Who did Jamahal Hill defeat by unanimous decision to win the UFC light heavyweight title at UFC 283?
Fact: Hill defeated Teixeira by unanimous decision at UFC 283 in January 2023 in Rio de Janeiro to win the light heavyweight title. It was a back-and-forth fight that Hill won clearly on the scorecards, becoming the new champion.

Question: Who did Nate Diaz submit with a rear naked choke at UFC 196 in one of the biggest upsets in UFC history?
Fact: Diaz stepped in on short notice and submitted McGregor in the second round at UFC 196 in a result that shocked the entire MMA world and set up one of the sport's greatest rematches.

Question: Who did Jiri Prochazka submit in the final seconds to win the UFC light heavyweight title at UFC 275?
Fact: Prochazka sunk in a rear naked choke with three seconds remaining at UFC 275 to submit Teixeira in one of the most dramatic finishes in light heavyweight championship history.

Question: What Pride acquisition came into the UFC with five consecutive losses, and debuted with a loss to Sean McCorkle at UFC 119?
Fact: Hunt arrived in the UFC after a rough stretch including five straight losses in Strikeforce and other promotions. He lost his UFC debut to McCorkle at UFC 119 in September 2010, but then went on one of the greatest turnarounds in UFC history, knocking out top heavyweights and becoming one of the most feared punchers in the division.

Question: Who did Jon Jones defeat by unanimous decision at UFC 172 to retain his UFC light heavyweight title?
Fact: Jones defeated Teixeira by unanimous decision at UFC 172 in Washington DC in one of his most dominant performances landing over 200 significant strikes against the top contender.

Question: Who did Julianna Pena submit in the second round to win the UFC women's bantamweight title at UFC 269?
Fact: Pena submitted the dominant champion Nunes with a rear naked choke in the second round at UFC 269 in one of the greatest upsets in women's MMA history.

Question: Who did Nate Diaz defeat by unanimous decision in his final fight before the McGregor rivalry?
Fact: Diaz defeated Johnson by unanimous decision at UFC Fight Night 62 in January 2016. He called out McGregor after the fight and was given the opportunity when Rafael dos Anjos withdrew injured, leading to one of the biggest upsets in UFC history.

Question: Who did Mark Hunt shock with a unanimous decision at UFC Fight Night 135 in one of the most surprising heavyweight upsets?
Fact: Hunt defeated Rothwell by unanimous decision at UFC Fight Night 135 in Auckland in June 2018. Given Hunt's reputation as a knockout artist, the decision win was surprising, and the result itself was an upset given Rothwell's standing in the division.

Question: Who did Leon Edwards defeat by majority decision to make his second welterweight title defense at UFC 286?
Fact: Edwards defeated Usman by majority decision in their trilogy fight at UFC 286 in Manchester to make his second title defense in front of his home crowd.

Question: Who is the only fighter to hold wins over Gray Maynard and Will Brooks?
Fact: Lentz holds victories over both Maynard and Brooks during his lengthy UFC tenure as a consistent lightweight and featherweight competitor. Despite never getting a title shot, Lentz built a solid resume of wins over notable fighters throughout his career.

Question: Which fighter is nicknamed Chaos?
Fact: Covington earned his Chaos nickname for his unpredictable personality and his aggressive wrestling-heavy style that earned him multiple welterweight title shots.

Question: Who did Petr Yan defeat to win the vacant UFC bantamweight championship at UFC 251?
Fact: Yan defeated Aldo by TKO in round 5 at UFC 251 in July 2020 on Fight Island to win the vacant bantamweight title. The title had been vacated when Henry Cejudo retired. Aldo had moved down from featherweight for the fight.

Question: Who did Kamaru Usman defeat by TKO in the fifth round to make his first UFC welterweight title defense at UFC 245?
Fact: Usman stopped Covington with punches in round 5 at UFC 245 in December 2019, making his first title defense. Covington had been dominant for much of the fight before Usman's heart and chin carried him to a late finish.

Question: What fighter defeated the rising and undefeated Stipe Miocic by TKO at UFC on Fuel TV 5?
Fact: Struve stopped an undefeated Miocic with a rear naked choke in round 1 at UFC on Fuel TV 5 in September 2012. It was the only time Miocic has been finished in his UFC career. Miocic regrouped and went on to become one of the greatest UFC heavyweight champions of all time.

Question: What fighter had this four-fight winning streak: Submission over Francisco Rivera, Unanimous Decision over Rob Font, KO over Michael McDonald, and Split Decision over John Dodson?
Fact: Lineker went on this impressive bantamweight run through the division, demonstrating his well-rounded skills with finishes and decision wins against quality opponents. Despite his impressive record, Lineker never captured a UFC title before moving on to other promotions.

Question: Who did Fabricio Werdum defeat to win the UFC heavyweight championship at UFC 188?
Fact: Werdum knocked out Velasquez in round 1 at UFC 188 in Mexico City in June 2015, becoming the undisputed UFC heavyweight champion. Velasquez was badly affected by the altitude in Mexico City and Werdum capitalized with a dominant submission finish.

Question: Who did Charles Oliveira defeat by submission to defend his UFC lightweight title at UFC 269?
Fact: Oliveira submitted Poirier with a rear naked choke in round 3 at UFC 269 in December 2021, making his first lightweight title defense. He had Poirier nearly finished early before Poirier fought back, setting up a dramatic third round submission.

Question: Awarded Fight of the Night, who did Matt Brown defeat by TKO at UFC on ABC 4 in his retirement fight?
Fact: Brown defeated McGee by TKO in his retirement fight at UFC on ABC 4, earning Fight of the Night honors. It was a fitting send-off for one of the most exciting welterweights in UFC history, known for his aggressive fighting style throughout his career.

Question: Who did Dustin Poirier defeat by TKO at UFC on Fox 30 before winning the interim Lightweight title against Max Holloway?
Fact: Poirier stopped Alvarez in round 2 at UFC on Fox 30 in July 2018, then went on to win the interim lightweight title against Holloway at UFC 236 in April 2019. The Alvarez win was a statement performance that proved Poirier belonged among the elite lightweights.

Question: Who did Chuck Liddell knock out to win his first UFC light heavyweight title at UFC 52?
Fact: Liddell knocked out Couture in the second round at UFC 52 to claim the light heavyweight title avenging his previous loss and establishing himself as the division's most feared striker.

Question: Who did Max Holloway defeat to become the undisputed UFC featherweight champion at UFC 212?
Fact: Holloway stopped Aldo in the third round at UFC 212 to win the undisputed featherweight title ending Aldo's legendary run and beginning his own historic championship reign.

Question: What fighter is known as The Underground King?
Fact: Alvarez earned the nickname The Underground King during his time competing in underground MMA circuits before becoming a professional. He went on to win titles in Bellator and the UFC, defeating Rafael dos Anjos for the lightweight championship at UFC Fight Night 90.

Question: What former UFC Heavyweight champion claims stake to having the most all-time wins at heavyweight in the UFC?
Fact: Arlovski has accumulated the most wins at heavyweight in UFC history across his two lengthy stints with the promotion. The former UFC heavyweight champion won the title in 2005 and after a long absence returned for a second run, accumulating an extraordinary number of victories in the division.

Question: Who did Yoel Romero knock out in the third round at UFC 205 to earn a title shot?
Fact: Romero knocked out the former champion Weidman in the third round at UFC 205 in one of the most entertaining middleweight fights on that historic card.

Question: What fighter defeated Luke Rockhold, Ronaldo Souza, and Corey Anderson to earn a shot at the vacant light heavyweight championship?
Fact: Blachowicz defeated Rockhold, Souza, and Anderson in succession to earn his shot at the vacant light heavyweight title, which he won by defeating Dominick Reyes at UFC 253. His wins over three former champions or top contenders made him the clear number one contender.

Question: What fighter is the only one to defeat Anthony Johnson twice?
Fact: Cormier defeated Johnson twice — first by submission in round 3 at UFC 187 to win the vacant UFC light heavyweight title, and again by TKO in round 3 at UFC 210 in his first title defense of his second reign. Johnson never won a UFC title despite being considered one of the most physically gifted fighters in the division.

Question: Which fighter is nicknamed La Pantera?
Fact: Rodriguez earned his La Pantera nickname for his creative and unpredictable striking style including his famous last-second elbow knockout of Chan Sung Jung at UFC Fight Night 139.

Question: Who did Mackenzie Dern defeat by decision at UFC 251 in a strawweight bout?
Fact: Dern defeated Jandiroba by unanimous decision at UFC 251 in July 2020 on Fight Island. The win was a significant step forward for Dern as she continued her climb through the strawweight rankings.

Question: Who did Mauricio Shogun Rua defeat by TKO to win the UFC light heavyweight title in their rematch at UFC 113?
Fact: Rua stopped Machida by TKO in the first round at UFC 113 to win the light heavyweight title in their rematch. Their first fight at UFC 104 saw Machida retain via controversial unanimous decision that Dana White himself said he thought Shogun won.

Question: Who did Joanna Jedrzejczyk defeat by TKO in round 3 to make her first UFC strawweight title defense at UFC Fight Night 69 in Berlin?
Fact: Jedrzejczyk stopped Penne with punches and a knee at 4:22 of round 3 at UFC Fight Night 69 in June 2015, earning Fight of the Night in her first title defense.

Question: Who did Max Holloway defeat by TKO in the fourth round to make his third UFC featherweight title defense at UFC 231?
Fact: Holloway stopped Ortega in the fourth round at UFC 231 in a fight that showcased his elite striking volume and durability against one of the most dangerous submission artists in the division.

Question: Who did Tom Aspinall knock out in 69 seconds to win the interim UFC heavyweight title at UFC 295?
Fact: Aspinall demolished Pavlovich in just over a minute at UFC 295 with a devastating combination earning Performance of the Night and establishing himself as the most dangerous heavyweight in the world.

Question: At UFC Vegas 80, what fighter ended Grant Dawson's nine-fight unbeaten streak in the UFC in 33 seconds?
Fact: Green, who legally changed his name to King Green, ended Dawson's impressive nine-fight UFC winning streak in just 33 seconds at UFC Vegas 80 with a stunning first-round finish. The upset was one of the biggest in lightweight history that year.

Question: Coming off winning the WEC Lightweight Championship at WEC 53, who did Anthony Pettis get upset by in his UFC debut?
Fact: Pettis entered the UFC as one of its most anticipated acquisitions after his famous wall-walk kick KO of Henderson at WEC 53 won him the WEC lightweight title. He was upset by Guida via unanimous decision in his UFC debut, derailing his immediate title shot hopes.

Question: Subsequently setting off a championship run, which fighter dropped his UFC debut with one second left against Craig Paul?
