Fact: Ankalaev lost his UFC debut to Paul with just one second remaining in round 1 at UFC Fight Night 148 in April 2019 — one of the most heartbreaking debut losses in UFC history. He rebounded to go on a remarkable winning streak, becoming one of the top light heavyweight contenders.

Question: Replacing Ricardo Lamas at UFC 143, what fighter was defeated by Dustin Poirier via submission in his UFC debut?
Fact: Holloway took the fight on short notice at UFC 143 in February 2012, losing to Poirier via submission in round 3. It was the beginning of a lengthy career that saw Holloway become one of the greatest featherweights in UFC history, while Poirier also rose to become a top lightweight.

Question: Which fighter is nicknamed The Terror?
Fact: Serra is known for his devastating knockout power and pulled off one of the biggest upsets in UFC history when he stopped Georges St-Pierre at UFC 69 to win the welterweight title.

Question: Who did Randy Couture defeat to win his first UFC heavyweight title?
Fact: Couture defeated kickboxer Maurice Smith by decision at UFC 15 in 1997 to win his first UFC heavyweight championship.

Question: Debuting at UFC Fight Night 24, which fighter exacted revenge and scored the first twister in UFC history against Leonard Garcia?
Fact: Jung submitted Garcia with a twister — a rare spine-cranking submission — at UFC Fight Night 24 in February 2011, becoming the first fighter to land the technique in UFC history. It was their rematch after Garcia had won a controversial decision in their first WEC fight.

Question: After losing to Nick Hein at UFC Fight Night: Munoz vs. Mousasi, what fighter went on to marry his opponent's sister?
Fact: Dober lost to Nick Hein at UFC Fight Night: Munoz vs. Mousasi in 2014, but the two fighters famously became brothers-in-law when Dober later married Hein's sister. Dober went on to become one of the most exciting lightweights on the UFC roster.

Question: Who did Brock Lesnar defeat to win the UFC heavyweight title at UFC 91?
Fact: Lesnar defeated Couture by TKO in round 2 at UFC 91 in November 2008 to win the heavyweight title. The win was a massive moment for the crossover star, who had transitioned from WWE and college wrestling to become one of the most dominant heavyweight champions of his era.

Question: Who did Max Holloway defeat in a rematch to make his third UFC featherweight title defense at UFC 218?
Fact: Holloway stopped Aldo in the third round of their rematch at UFC 218 to make his third title defense emphatically settling their featherweight rivalry.

Question: Awarded Fight of the Night, which fighter was badly hurt by a body shot by Pete Sell, but turned the tables seconds later with a knockout at TUF: The Comeback Finale?
Fact: Smith was dropped by a body shot from Sell and appeared nearly finished before uncorking a wild overhand right that knocked Sell out cold in one of the most dramatic turnarounds in UFC history at TUF: The Comeback Finale in November 2006. The moment became one of the iconic clips in UFC history.

Question: Who did Shane Carwin defeat to earn his UFC heavyweight title fight against Brock Lesnar at UFC 111?
Fact: Carwin stopped Mir by TKO in round 1 at UFC 111 in March 2010, earning his shot at Lesnar's heavyweight title. The finish was dominant and announced Carwin as one of the most dangerous punchers in the heavyweight division.

Question: What fighter had this four-fight winning streak: Submission over Ulka Sasaki, Submission over Ben Nguyen, Unanimous Decision over Sergio Pettis, and Unanimous Decision over Deiveson Figueiredo?
Fact: Formiga went on this flyweight run to establish himself as one of the top contenders in the division. His wins over Pettis and Figueiredo — who went on to become UFC flyweight champion — are particularly noteworthy in hindsight.

Question: Who did Valentina Shevchenko knock out with a head kick at UFC 238?
Fact: Shevchenko landed a brutal head kick KO on Eye in round 1 at UFC 238 in June 2019. It was one of the cleanest head kick knockouts in women's MMA history and a highlight-reel finish for the dominant flyweight champion.

Question: Which fighter is nicknamed Borrachinha?
Fact: Costa earned his Borrachinha nickname which means Little Drunk in Portuguese for his aggressive forward-moving fighting style.

Question: Who did Diego Sanchez defeat by TKO in the finale of The Ultimate Fighter Season 1 to win the middleweight tournament?
Fact: Sanchez defeated Florian by TKO in the middleweight final of TUF 1 on April 9, 2005, in Las Vegas. The same night featured the iconic Griffin vs. Bonnar fight that helped launch the UFC's mainstream rise. Sanchez later defeated Nick Diaz at TUF 2 Finale in his next fight.

Question: Who did Israel Adesanya stop with ground-and-pound in round 2 to make his first UFC middleweight title defense at UFC 253?
Fact: Adesanya dominated Costa from the opening bell at UFC 253 in Abu Dhabi, dropping him with body shots and finishing him on the ground. It was widely considered the most dominant middleweight title defense in recent memory.

Question: Who did Lyoto Machida defeat at UFC 94 to extend his unbeaten record before his title shot?
Fact: Machida defeated Silva by unanimous decision at UFC 94 to extend his unbeaten record and earn a title shot against Rashad Evans at UFC 98 where he won the light heavyweight championship.

Question: Who did Georges St-Pierre stop by TKO in the second round to win back the UFC welterweight title at UFC 83 in Montreal?
Fact: GSP dominated Serra in their UFC 83 rematch in Montreal, stopping him in the second round with knees and ground strikes to unify the UFC welterweight championship. UFC 83 was the UFC's first event in Canada.

Question: Who did Conor McGregor knock out in 40 seconds in a welterweight bout at UFC 246?
Fact: McGregor returned from a long absence to knock out Cerrone at welterweight in just 40 seconds at UFC 246 in January 2020 in Las Vegas. He used shoulder strikes and a head kick to drop Cerrone before finishing with ground strikes.

Question: Who did Lyoto Machida knock out with a flying knee in just 62 seconds at UFC Fight Night 58?
Fact: Machida finished Dollaway with a flying knee in just 62 seconds at UFC Fight Night 58 in December 2014 in Brazil. The dramatic finish was one of the most spectacular of Machida's career and came in front of his home country fans.

Question: Who did Belal Muhammad defeat to win the UFC welterweight title at UFC 304?
Fact: Muhammad defeated Edwards by unanimous decision at UFC 304 in Manchester to win the welterweight title in front of a passionate crowd that had come to cheer the defending champion.

Question: Who did Tito Ortiz defeat at UFC 40 to retain his UFC light heavyweight title?
Fact: Ortiz knocked out Shamrock in the third round at UFC 40 settling one of the most personal rivalries in early UFC history.

Question: Who did Anderson Silva defeat in a rematch at UFC 148 via second round TKO?
Fact: Silva stopped Sonnen with a TKO in round 2 at UFC 148 in July 2012, avenging the first fight where Sonnen had dominated him for 4.5 rounds. Silva caught Sonnen with strikes against the cage after a wild exchange, ending one of the greatest rivalries in UFC history.

Question: Who did Dominick Cruz defeat by split decision at UFC Fight Night 81 in Boston to win back the bantamweight title?
Fact: Cruz defeated Dillashaw by split decision at UFC Fight Night 81 in January 2016, reclaiming the bantamweight title after a lengthy absence due to multiple knee injuries. It was a remarkable comeback for one of the most technically gifted fighters in UFC history.

Question: What fighter, making his UFC debut, replaced Renan Barao after a weight cut mishap and fought TJ Dillashaw for the UFC bantamweight Championship?
Fact: Soto stepped in on 10 days notice to replace Barao at UFC 177 in August 2014 after Barao collapsed during his weight cut. Dillashaw stopped Soto in round 4, making the first defense of his bantamweight title he had won by upsetting Barao.

Question: Who did Joanna Jedrzejczyk defeat by unanimous decision at The Ultimate Fighter 23 Finale to make her third UFC strawweight title defense in a rematch?
Fact: Jedrzejczyk defended her title against Gadelha in their July 2016 rematch at TUF 23 Finale, winning by unanimous decision. Their first fight at UFC on FOX 13 was before Joanna's title reign, making this her third successful defense.

Question: Who did Valentina Shevchenko defeat at UFC 231 to win the UFC women's flyweight championship?
Fact: Shevchenko won the flyweight title at UFC 231 in December 2018, defeating Jedrzejczyk by unanimous decision in Toronto. She went on to make seven consecutive title defenses, becoming one of the most dominant champions in UFC history.

Question: Who did Michael Bisping shock with a first-round TKO at UFC 199 to win the UFC middleweight title?
Fact: Bisping stepped in on 17 days notice to replace the injured Chris Weidman and knocked out champion Luke Rockhold in the first round at UFC 199 to win the middleweight title in his first-ever title shot after 26 UFC fights.

Question: What former Strikeforce Lightweight Champion struggled in the UFC, going 1-6, with the lone win coming against Diego Sanchez?
Fact: Melendez was considered one of the best lightweights in the world when he joined the UFC after winning the Strikeforce lightweight title, but he struggled in the Octagon, going 1-6 with his only win coming against Sanchez. He was released in 2017.

Question: Who did Jiri Prochazka knock out at UFC on ESPN 23 to earn a UFC light heavyweight title shot?
Fact: Prochazka knocked out Reyes in round 2 at UFC on ESPN 23 in May 2021, earning his light heavyweight title shot against Glover Teixeira. The emphatic finish announced the Czech fighter as one of the most dangerous strikers in the division.

Question: What former UFC Lightweight Champion upset Stephen Thompson via knockout at UFC Fight Night 148?
Fact: Pettis knocked out Thompson in round 1 at UFC Fight Night 148 in March 2019, one of the biggest upsets in welterweight history that year. Thompson was considered a top welterweight contender going in, while Pettis was making his welterweight debut after a difficult stretch.

Question: What fighter had this four-fight winning streak: Unanimous Decision over Alexey Kunchenko, Unanimous Decision over Gunnar Nelson, TKO over Demian Maia, and Unanimous Decision over Tyron Woodley?
Fact: Burns ran through the welterweight division with victories over Kunchenko, Nelson, Maia, and Woodley to earn a UFC welterweight title shot against Kamaru Usman at UFC 258, where he dropped Usman early before being stopped in round 3.

Question: Who did Alexander Gustafsson defeat by unanimous decision at UFC on Fox 14, earning himself a second light heavyweight title shot?
Fact: Gustafsson defeated Johnson by unanimous decision at UFC on Fox 14 in January 2015, earning his second light heavyweight title shot. Johnson rebounded from the loss to go on a remarkable winning streak that earned him his own title shot against Daniel Cormier.

Question: Who did Jon Jones fight in a rematch at UFC 214 before the result was overturned?
Fact: Jones defeated Cormier by unanimous decision at UFC 214 but the result was overturned to a no contest after Jones failed a drug test making it one of the most controversial results in UFC history.

Question: What fighter improved to 11-0 after defeating Tyson Griffin, but then saw his undefeated record end against Sean Sherk at UFC 119?
Fact: Dunham went undefeated through his first 11 fights including a win over Griffin before running into Sherk at UFC 119 in September 2010, where he lost a unanimous decision. Despite the defeat, Dunham went on to have a solid UFC career as a respected lightweight contender.

Question: Who did Dustin Poirier lose to by TKO in round 1 in a featherweight bout at UFC 178?
Fact: McGregor finished Poirier with a barrage of punches in round 1 at UFC 178 in September 2014, establishing himself as a featherweight contender. They went on to fight four times total, with each fighter winning twice.

Question: Debuting at UFC on Fox 17, Valentina Shevchenko defeated what former Strikeforce Bantamweight Champion?
Fact: Shevchenko made her UFC debut at UFC on Fox 17 in December 2015, defeating former Strikeforce bantamweight champion Kaufman by unanimous decision. It announced her arrival in the UFC as a serious contender at 135 pounds.

Question: Which fighter is nicknamed Short Fuse?
Fact: Herman earned the nickname Short Fuse, fitting for the aggressive light heavyweight and middleweight fighter who was always looking for the finish. He had a long UFC career spanning multiple weight classes and was known for his exciting fighting style.

Question: What fighter debuted on short notice against Beneil Dariush at UFC 222, winning via knockout in 42 seconds?
Fact: Hernandez stepped in on short notice at UFC 222 in March 2018 and knocked out Dariush in just 42 seconds, one of the most impressive debut performances in lightweight history. The win announced him as a major prospect in the division.

Question: Who did Joanna Jedrzejczyk defeat by unanimous decision at UFC 205 to make her fourth UFC strawweight title defense at Madison Square Garden?
Fact: Jedrzejczyk dominated Kowalkiewicz over five rounds at UFC 205 in November 2016 at Madison Square Garden, making her fourth strawweight title defense. It was a masterclass in striking from the Polish champion on the biggest stage in UFC history.

Question: Who did Anthony Johnson knock out to earn a UFC light heavyweight title shot at UFC on Fox 17?
Fact: Johnson destroyed Bader in the first round with his trademark power to earn a title shot against Daniel Cormier showcasing the kind of one-punch knockout ability that made him one of the most feared fighters in the division.

Question: What fighter had this four-fight winning streak: KO over Thiago Santos, TKO over Vitor Belfort, TKO over Uriah Hall, and TKO over Chris Weidman?
Fact: Mousasi went on this dominant run through the middleweight division, finishing all four opponents and defeating two former UFC champions in Belfort and Weidman. The streak established him as a legitimate title contender before he eventually moved to Bellator.

Question: Who did Shavkat Rakhmonov finish by TKO in the second round to remain undefeated and earn a welterweight title shot at UFC 296?
Fact: Rakhmonov stopped Thompson in the second round at UFC 296 to maintain his perfect professional record and earn the right to fight for the welterweight title.

Question: Who did Jon Jones defeat to win the UFC heavyweight championship?
Fact: Jones defeated Gane by submission in the first round at UFC 285 in his heavyweight debut to add a second world title to his legacy.

Question: Who did Anthony Johnson knock out to earn a UFC light heavyweight title shot at UFC 202?
Fact: Johnson knocked out Teixeira at UFC 202 to earn his light heavyweight title shot against Daniel Cormier. The finish was a devastating display of Johnson's power and established him as the top contender in the division.

Question: What future Featherweight champion halted Darren Elkins' six-fight win streak at UFC Fight Night 133?
Fact: Volkanovski defeated Elkins by unanimous decision at UFC Fight Night 133 in July 2018, halting Elkins' impressive six-fight winning streak. It was a significant statement win for Volkanovski as he continued his march toward the featherweight title.

Question: What fighter won the UFC 10 and UFC 11 tournaments?
Fact: Coleman won both the UFC 10 and UFC 11 tournaments in 1996 then became the first UFC heavyweight champion by submitting Dan Severn with a neck crank at UFC 12.

Question: Who did Derrick Lewis dramatically knock out in the closing seconds of the third round at UFC 229 in one of the greatest comeback victories in heavyweight history?
Fact: Lewis was losing badly on the scorecards when he landed a single right hand that dropped Volkov with 11 seconds remaining in round 3, then finished him with ground strikes. The comeback KO at UFC 229 earned him the Performance of the Night bonus.

Question: Who did Valentina Shevchenko defeat in a split decision at UFC 275 to make her seventh consecutive flyweight title defense?
Fact: Shevchenko edged Santos in a split decision at UFC 275 in one of the closest title fights of her reign. Santos knocked Shevchenko down in later rounds but the champion survived to retain her record seventh defense.

Question: Who did Paulo Costa defeat by unanimous decision at UFC 241 to earn his UFC middleweight title shot?
Fact: Costa defeated Romero by unanimous decision at UFC 241 in August 2019, earning a shot at the middleweight title against Robert Whittaker. The five-round war showcased Costa's chin and cardio as he outlasted the iron Romero.

Question: Who did Junior dos Santos defeat to defend his UFC heavyweight title at UFC 146?
Fact: JDS stopped Mir with punches in round 2 at UFC 146 in May 2012, making his first heavyweight title defense. The finish was dominant and reaffirmed JDS as one of the most dangerous strikers in heavyweight history.

Question: What fighter had this four-fight unbeaten streak: NC against Karo Parisyan, Unanimous Decision over TJ Grant, Unanimous Decision over Amir Sadollah, and Unanimous Decision over Nate Diaz?
Fact: Kim went on this unbeaten run through the welterweight division, building his perfect record against quality competition before Carlos Condit ended it with a flying knee knockout at UFC 132. The streak included a no contest against Parisyan due to a cut and decision wins over solid welterweights.

Question: Who did Jorge Masvidal defeat by unanimous decision at UFC 244 to win the BMF title?
Fact: Masvidal defeated Diaz in a highly anticipated grudge match at UFC 244 in Madison Square Garden to win the BMF belt presented by Dwayne Johnson in front of a sold-out crowd.

Question: Which fighter is nicknamed The Italian Dream?
Fact: Vettori earned his nickname as a nod to his Italian heritage and his dream of becoming a UFC world champion.

Question: Who did Khamzat Chimaev submit in 17 seconds in his UFC debut at UFC Fight Night 178?
Fact: Chimaev submitted Meerschaert in just 17 seconds at UFC Fight Night 178 in October 2020, one of the fastest debut finishes in UFC history. The performance announced Chimaev as a legitimate middleweight and welterweight prospect immediately.

Question: Prior to dethroning Dricus du Plessis at UFC 319, who did Khamzat Chimaev submit in round one at UFC 308?
Fact: Chimaev submitted former middleweight champion Whittaker in round 1 at UFC 308 in October 2024, cementing his status as the top contender. He went on to defeat du Plessis for the middleweight title at UFC 319.

Question: In what would be his final UFC fight, what fighter defeated BJ Penn by majority decision in 2017 at UFC Fight Night: Chiesa vs. Lee?
Fact: Siver defeated the legendary Penn by majority decision at UFC Fight Night: Chiesa vs. Lee in August 2017. It was Penn's seventh consecutive loss and Siver's final UFC fight before his departure from the promotion.

Question: Which fighter is nicknamed Borz?
Fact: Chimaev's nickname Borz means 'Wolf' in Chechen, reflecting his Chechen heritage. The Swedish-Chechen fighter became one of the most feared prospects in UFC history with his dominant wrestling and aggressive finishing ability.

Question: Who did Tai Tuivasa knock out at UFC 313 to extend his win streak to five?
Fact: Tuivasa knocked out Lewis at UFC 313 to extend his winning streak to five, reasserting himself as one of the most dangerous heavyweights in the division. The win over one of the most feared punchers in heavyweight history was a major statement.

Question: Who did Matt Hughes defeat to win his first UFC welterweight title?
Fact: Hughes defeated Newton by TKO in the first round at UFC 34 to win the welterweight championship and begin a dominant title reign.

Question: Who did Nate Diaz defeat in his UFC debut at UFC 65?
Fact: Diaz made his UFC debut at UFC 65 in November 2006, defeating Josh Neer by unanimous decision. The win began a long and storied UFC career for one of the promotion's most popular and polarizing fighters.

Question: What fighter had this four-fight winning streak: Split Decision over Timothy Johnson, Unanimous Decision over Roy Nelson, TKO over Stefan Struve, and KO over Fabricio Werdum?
Fact: Volkov went on this impressive heavyweight run to establish himself as a top contender, with the KO over former UFC champion Werdum being the standout result. The streak earned him a heavyweight title shot against Daniel Cormier at UFC 229, where he lost a dramatic late TKO.

Question: Who did Leon Edwards defeat by unanimous decision at UFC 263 to position himself as the top welterweight contender?
Fact: Edwards defeated Diaz at UFC 263 in a closely contested fight that elevated his status and set up his eventual title fight with Kamaru Usman.

Question: Who did Jeremy Stephens knock out in the first round at UFC on Fox 28?
Fact: Stephens knocked out Emmett with a vicious left hook in round 1 at UFC on Fox 28 in February 2018, earning Performance of the Night. The finish was a devastating blow that left Emmett unconscious and briefly hospitalized.

Question: Who did Tony Ferguson defeat by decision at TUF: Latin America Finale 3 to record his ninth consecutive UFC victory?
Fact: Ferguson defeated dos Anjos by unanimous decision at TUF: Latin America Finale 3 in November 2016, extending his winning streak to nine. The win was significant as dos Anjos was a former UFC lightweight champion, validating Ferguson's rise to the top of the division.

Question: Who did Conor McGregor defeat at UFC Fight Night 59 by TKO in round 2?
Fact: McGregor stopped Siver with a TKO in round 2 at UFC Fight Night 59 in Boston in January 2015. The performance against the experienced German kickboxer showcased McGregor's striking precision and power at featherweight.

Question: After the WEC merger, who did Urijah Faber debut against at UFC 128?
Fact: Faber made his UFC debut at UFC 128 in March 2011 after the WEC merged with the UFC, defeating Wineland by unanimous decision. Faber was one of the most recognized stars from the WEC and his UFC debut was highly anticipated.

Question: Who did Benson Henderson defeat by unanimous decision at UFC 144 in Japan to win the UFC lightweight title?
Fact: Henderson defeated Edgar by unanimous decision at UFC 144 in Saitama Japan to become the new UFC lightweight champion in a close fight that earned both men Fight of the Night honors.

Question: Which fighter is nicknamed Malhadinho?
Fact: Almeida earned his Malhadinho nickname in Brazil reflecting his background in the favelas and his determination to succeed through MMA.

Question: Who did Johny Hendricks defeat to earn his first UFC welterweight title shot?
Fact: Hendricks defeated Condit by unanimous decision at UFC 158 to earn his title shot against Georges St-Pierre in a fight that showcased his elite wrestling and left hand power.

Question: Who did Jailton Almeida defeat by TKO at UFC Fight Night 231 to continue his unbeaten UFC run?
Fact: Almeida submitted Lewis via rear naked choke at UFC Fight Night 231, continuing his dominant run in the UFC. The win over one of the most feared punchers in heavyweight history showcased Almeida's elite grappling and ability to control dangerous opponents.

Question: Who is the only fighter to hold wins over BJ Penn, Urijah Faber, and Charles Oliveira?
Fact: Edgar holds a remarkable resume spanning multiple eras: he defeated Penn twice to win and defend the UFC lightweight title, beat Faber in a featherweight bout, and finished Oliveira via TKO at UFC 162 when Oliveira was still an unpolished prospect. Edgar never won a UFC title outside lightweight despite competing for it four times.

Question: Who did Anthony Pettis defeat with the famous Showtime kick at WEC 53, the event just prior to his UFC debut?
Fact: Pettis knocked out Henderson with the iconic Showtime kick — running up the cage wall and launching a kick to Henderson's head — at WEC 53 in December 2010 to win the WEC lightweight title. The finish is one of the most replayed in MMA history and earned Pettis his UFC contract.

Question: Who did Joanna Jedrzejczyk defeat by unanimous decision at UFC 211 to make her fifth UFC strawweight title defense?
Fact: Jedrzejczyk defeated Andrade over five rounds at UFC 211 in May 2017, making her fifth and final strawweight title defense. It was a dominant striking display by the Polish champion before she lost the title to Rose Namajunas at UFC 217 later that year.

Question: Who is the only fighter to defeat Carlos Diego Ferreira twice?
Fact: Dariush defeated Ferreira twice during his UFC career, making him the only fighter to beat Ferreira more than once. The wins were part of Dariush's long winning streak that established him as a top lightweight contender.

Question: What fighter started his UFC tenure with a bang, finishing Martin Kampmann and Dustin Hazelett, before losing to Josh Koscheck?
Fact: Daley made an immediate impact in the UFC with back-to-back stoppages of Kampmann and Hazelett, establishing himself as one of the most exciting welterweights in the promotion. His run ended with a loss to Koscheck, and he was subsequently released after punching Koscheck after the final bell.

Question: Who did BJ Penn defeat by TKO to make his first UFC lightweight title defense at UFC 84?
Fact: Penn stopped Sherk via TKO at the end of round 3 at UFC 84 in May 2008, in his first lightweight title defense. Sherk had previously been stripped of the title after testing positive for steroids.

Question: At UFC on Fox 7, what fighter was the first to stop Nate Diaz via strikes?
Fact: Thompson became the first fighter to stop Diaz via strikes at UFC on Fox 7 in April 2013, finishing him with punches in round 3. Diaz had previously been submitted but never stopped on his feet, making Thompson's finish a historic moment in the rivalry.

Question: Who did Aljamain Sterling defeat at UFC 280 to retain his UFC bantamweight title?
Fact: Sterling defeated Yan by unanimous decision at UFC 280 in October 2022, making his second title defense and settling their rivalry once and for all. Sterling dominated the fight with his grappling, putting any debate about his legitimacy as champion to rest.

Question: At UFC 252, what fighter became the first to defeat Sean O'Malley?
Fact: Vera stopped O'Malley via TKO in round 1 at UFC 252 in August 2020 after O'Malley suffered a leg injury. It was O'Malley's first and, for a long time, only professional loss, and it came against the durable Ecuadorian bantamweight.

Question: What fighter in less than fourteen months won four straight UFC fights all via strikes, then lost to Derrick Lewis and four more times after that?
Fact: Daukaus went on a stunning four-fight KO streak in the heavyweight division before running into Lewis, who knocked him out to snap the streak. Daukaus struggled to recapture his early form and lost four more fights after the Lewis defeat.

Question: What fighter had this four-fight winning streak: TKO over Chris Lytle, TKO over Karo Parisyan, TKO over Matt Hughes, and Unanimous Decision over Josh Koscheck?
Fact: Alves went on this devastating welterweight run, finishing former champion Hughes and defeating top contender Koscheck to earn his shot at GSP's title at UFC 100. His powerful Muay Thai made him one of the most feared strikers at welterweight during his prime.

Question: Who did Conor McGregor face in his boxing match outside of MMA?
Fact: McGregor fought Floyd Mayweather in a boxing match in August 2017 losing by TKO in the tenth round in a massive pay-per-view event.

Question: Which fighter is nicknamed The Spartan?
Fact: Theodorou was a Canadian fighter known for his unorthodox striking style and holds the distinction of being the first UFC fighter to be licensed to use medical cannabis during competition.

Question: Who did Aljamain Sterling defeat by TKO to retain his UFC bantamweight title at UFC 280?
Fact: Sterling stopped Dillashaw via TKO in round 2 at UFC 280 in October 2022. Dillashaw suffered a shoulder injury during the fight and was unable to continue, giving Sterling the TKO victory in his third title defense.

Question: At UFC 311, what fighter was originally slated to face Beneil Dariush, but was bumped up to fight for the Lightweight Championship against Islam Makhachev after Arman Tsarukyan pulled out one day before the event?
Fact: Moicano was scheduled to face Dariush at UFC 311 when Tsarukyan withdrew just one day before the event, and Moicano stepped up to challenge champion Makhachev on incredibly short notice. Despite the circumstances, he accepted the fight and competed on the biggest stage of his career.

Question: What former Bellator Lightweight Champion, who had defeated Michael Chandler twice, flamed out in the UFC with a 1-3 record?
Fact: Brooks won the Bellator lightweight title and defeated Chandler twice in Bellator, making him one of the most highly anticipated UFC signings. However, he struggled in the Octagon, going just 1-3 before being released, in one of the more disappointing transitions from Bellator to the UFC.

Question: At UFC 116, what debuting fighter was rudely welcomed to the UFC, suffering a KO slam by Gerald Harris?
Fact: Branch was knocked out by Harris via a slam at UFC 116 in July 2010 in his UFC debut. Despite the rough welcome, Branch went on to have a successful MMA career, winning titles in WSOF and eventually returning to the UFC as a legitimate contender.

Question: Which fighter is nicknamed The Fireball Kid?
Fact: Gomi earned the nickname The Fireball Kid for his explosive, aggressive fighting style as one of Pride FC's most exciting lightweights. He went on to compete in the UFC where he faced top contenders including Nate Diaz and Clay Guida.

Question: What fighter scored back-to-back upsets, defeating Mackenzie Dern via majority decision at UFC Fight Night 211 and Jessica Andrade via knockout at UFC 288?
Fact: Yan defeated Dern by majority decision and then knocked out Andrade to put herself in title contention in the strawweight division. The back-to-back wins over two of the division's most dangerous fighters established her as a legitimate title challenger.

Question: In the UFC Flyweight Tournament Semifinal, what fighter drew against Demetrious Johnson at UFC on FX 2?
Fact: McCall drew with Johnson at UFC on FX 2 in March 2012 in the flyweight tournament semifinal, one of the most controversial decisions in UFC history. Johnson won the rematch and went on to become the first UFC flyweight champion.

Question: What fighter had this four-fight winning streak: Split Decision over Nick Osipczak, TKO over Dustin Hazelett, Unanimous Decision over Johny Hendricks, and Unanimous Decision over Thiago Alves?
Fact: Story went on this impressive welterweight run, with his unanimous decision win over Hendricks being particularly notable as Hendricks went on to become UFC welterweight champion. The streak established Story as a serious top-10 welterweight contender during his UFC tenure.

Question: Which fighter is nicknamed Denisa?
Fact: Prochazka earned his Denisa nickname in Czech MMA circles for his wild and unpredictable fighting style. He went on to become the UFC light heavyweight champion with one of the most dramatic title wins in division history.

Question: What fighter holds the record for all-time finishes in the UFC with 21?
Fact: Oliveira holds the UFC record for most finishes with 21, surpassing the previous record during his dominant lightweight title run. His extraordinary submission game accounts for the majority of the finishes, making him the most prolific finisher in UFC history.

Question: What fighter won TUF: Tournament of Champions and earned the opportunity to face Demetrious Johnson for the UFC flyweight title?
Fact: Elliott won The Ultimate Fighter: Tournament of Champions, earning a flyweight title shot against the dominant Demetrious Johnson. Despite losing to Johnson, Elliott went on to have a long UFC career as one of the most entertaining flyweights in the division.

Question: What fighter is the all-time leader in total cage time in the UFC?
Fact: Holloway has spent more time inside the UFC cage than any other fighter in history, a testament to his durability, activity, and longevity at the top of the featherweight division. His lengthy title reign and multiple five-round title fights contributed heavily to the record.

Question: Who did Edson Barboza knock out with a spinning heel kick at UFC on FX 7 in one of the most spectacular finishes in lightweight history?
Fact: Barboza's spinning heel kick to the head of Etim at UFC on FX 7 is widely regarded as one of the most spectacular knockouts in UFC history earning him Performance of the Night.

Question: Which fighter is nicknamed El Matador?
Fact: Topuria earned his El Matador nickname for his matador-like precision in finishing opponents and his Spanish-influenced fighting style from his time training in Spain.

Question: Who did Michael Chandler knock out in the first round in his UFC debut at UFC 257?
Fact: Chandler stopped Hooker with punches in the first round of his UFC debut at UFC 257 announcing himself as an immediate lightweight contender with an explosive performance.

Question: Which UFC event was the first to sell over one million pay-per-view buys, headlined by Chuck Liddell vs. Tito Ortiz II?
Fact: UFC 66 drew approximately 1,050,000 PPV buys in December 2006, becoming the first UFC event to break the one million mark. The main event was Chuck Liddell defending his light heavyweight title against Tito Ortiz in their rematch.

Question: Who did Kamaru Usman knock out to make his fourth UFC welterweight title defense at UFC 261?
Fact: Usman knocked out Masvidal with a left hand in round 2 at UFC 261 in April 2021, making his fourth title defense. The finish was stunning as Masvidal had been competitive before eating the perfectly timed shot.

Question: What fighter had this four-fight winning streak: Unanimous Decision over Kyle Bochniak, Submission over Brandon Davis, Unanimous Decision over Jeremy Stephens, and Unanimous Decision over Calvin Kattar?
Fact: Magomedsharipov went on this unbeaten run through the featherweight division, with his wins over Stephens and Kattar — two of the division's most durable fighters — being particularly impressive. His creative striking and grappling made him one of the most anticipated featherweight prospects before inactivity derailed his momentum.

Question: Who did Ilia Topuria knock out in the second round to win the UFC featherweight title at UFC 298?
Fact: Topuria knocked out the previously dominant Volkanovski in the second round at UFC 298 to become the first Georgian UFC champion and announce himself as the new face of the featherweight division.

Question: Who did Sean O'Malley knock out in the second round to win the UFC bantamweight title at UFC 292?
Fact: O'Malley stopped Sterling in the second round at UFC 292 with clean punching to win the bantamweight title in his first championship fight showing his elite striking ability.

Question: What fighter defeated Tim Elliott, Alexandre Pantoja, and Joseph Benavidez to remain unbeaten before losing his first fight at UFC on ESPN 33 to Kai Kara-France?
Fact: Askarov went undefeated through his UFC flyweight run, defeating Elliott, Pantoja, and Benavidez along the way, before suffering his first professional loss to Kara-France at UFC on ESPN 33 in July 2022. His wins over multiple top flyweights made the loss all the more surprising.

Question: Who did Merab Dvalishvili defeat at UFC Fight Night 223 to earn his UFC bantamweight title shot?
Fact: Dvalishvili defeated the former champion Yan by unanimous decision at UFC Fight Night 223 earning his title shot against Sean O'Malley with a dominant wrestling performance.

Question: What fighter was a perfect 15-0, with back-to-back wins over Diego Sanchez and Takanori Gomi before losing to Donald Cerrone?
Fact: Jury entered his fight with Cerrone undefeated at 15-0 and came off impressive wins over Sanchez and Gomi. Cerrone dominated Jury and finished him in round 1 at UFC 182, ending the hype surrounding the undefeated prospect.

Question: Which fighter is nicknamed The Tarantula?
Fact: Turner earned his Tarantula nickname for his long limbs and his ability to trap opponents and finish them with submissions or strikes.

Question: Who did Carlos Condit defeat to earn his UFC welterweight title shot?
Fact: Condit defeated Diaz by unanimous decision at UFC 143 to win the interim welterweight title earning himself a shot at Georges St-Pierre in a fight many felt Diaz had won.

Question: What fighter was let go despite going 7-1 in the UFC, with the lone loss coming in a title fight against Demetrious Johnson?
Fact: Horiguchi compiled a 7-1 record in the UFC, with his only loss coming in a flyweight title fight against Demetrious Johnson. Despite his impressive record, he was released and went on to have a dominant career in Rizin, winning multiple titles in Japan.

Question: Who did Georges St-Pierre defeat by unanimous decision at UFC 129 to make his sixth welterweight title defense?
Fact: GSP dominated Shields over five rounds at UFC 129 in April 2011 in Montreal, making his sixth welterweight title defense. GSP controlled the fight with his wrestling and ground-and-pound despite suffering an eye injury early in the bout.

Question: What fighter had this four-fight winning streak: Unanimous Decision over Rob Font, Split Decision over Antonio Carlos Junior, TKO over Anderson Silva, and TKO over Chris Weidman?
Fact: Hall went on this run through the middleweight division's best, with wins over Font, then former champions Silva and Weidman back-to-back. The streak represented the peak of Hall's career and made him a legitimate middleweight title contender.

Question: Who did Conor McGregor stop by TKO at UFC Fight Night 46 in Dublin in his third UFC fight?
Fact: McGregor's TKO of Brandao in Dublin in July 2014 was his third UFC fight and one of the most electric atmospheres in UFC history. The crowd eruption after the finish is considered a defining moment in UFC's growth in Ireland.

Question: What fighter, who was a protege of Daniel Cormier, started out 6-0, with two of the wins coming against Tom Lawler and Eric Spicely in the UFC?
Fact: Winn trained under Daniel Cormier and made a strong start to his UFC career at middleweight, going 6-0 overall with wins over Lawler and Spicely in the UFC. His close association with Cormier and his wrestling background made him a highly touted prospect.

Question: What 25-fight UFC veteran, who fights in the middleweight division, has a 100% finishing rate?
Fact: Meerschaert has never gone to a decision in the UFC across his extensive middleweight tenure, maintaining a perfect 100% finishing rate. The submission specialist is one of the most active grapplers in the division and holds numerous Performance of the Night bonuses.

Question: Who did Ciryl Gane lose his unbeaten record to at UFC 270?
Fact: Ngannou defeated Gane by unanimous decision at UFC 270 in January 2022, ending Gane's unbeaten run in the title unification bout. Despite losing, Gane's performance showcased his technical ability against the fearsome Ngannou.

Question: What fighter had this four-fight winning streak: Submission over Jacob Volkmann, TKO over James Krause, Decision over Pat Healy, and Split Decision over Josh Thompson?
Fact: Green, who later legally changed his name to King Green, went on this winning streak to establish himself as a top lightweight contender. Despite never winning a UFC title, he became one of the most durable and entertaining fighters in the lightweight division.

Question: Who did Islam Makhachev defeat by submission to defend his UFC lightweight title at UFC 302?
Fact: Makhachev submitted Poirier with a rear naked choke at UFC 302 in June 2024, making his lightweight title defense. Poirier was competitive before Makhachev dragged him to the ground and secured the finish.

Question: Who defeated Belal Muhammad at UFC 315 to win the UFC welterweight Championship?
Fact: Della Maddalena defeated Muhammad to win the UFC welterweight title at UFC 315, capping a remarkable rise through the welterweight division. The Australian fighter had gone unbeaten in the UFC en route to the title shot.

Question: Who did Mateusz Gamrot defeat by unanimous decision at UFC Vegas 57 in a key lightweight contender fight?
Fact: Gamrot defeated Tsarukyan by unanimous decision at UFC Vegas 57 in June 2022 in a pivotal lightweight contender fight. Tsarukyan got his revenge in a rematch that went to him, setting up their rivalry as two of the division's top contenders.

Question: Who did Pantoja defeat at UFC 277 to earn a flyweight title shot against Brandon Moreno?
Fact: Pantoja defeated Perez at UFC 277 in July 2022 to earn his flyweight title shot against Moreno. He went on to win the flyweight title by defeating Moreno at UFC 290, becoming the UFC flyweight champion.

Question: What fighter did Wanderlei Silva defeat twice in Pride, but has since defeated him twice, once at UFC 92 and once at Bellator 206?
Fact: Silva defeated Rampage twice in Pride — once in the 2003 middleweight Grand Prix. However, Jackson got his revenge twice: knocking out Silva at UFC 92 in 2008 and again at Bellator 206 in 2018, making their head-to-head record 2-2 across organizations.

Question: Who did Frankie Edgar draw against in a wild fight at UFC 125?
Fact: Edgar and Maynard fought to a majority draw at UFC 125 in January 2011 in their first meeting. Maynard dominated early and dropped Edgar multiple times but couldn't finish, allowing Edgar to recover and take over late rounds. Their rivalry continued through two more fights.

Question: Who did Alexa Grasso draw with at Noche UFC to retain the UFC women's flyweight title?
Fact: Grasso and Shevchenko fought to a split draw at Noche UFC in September 2023, allowing Grasso to retain the flyweight title. Shevchenko appeared to have won the final round to seal the fight, making the draw one of the most controversial results in women's MMA history.

Question: Who did Derrick Lewis knock out at UFC Fight Night 199 to break the UFC all-time knockout record?
Fact: Lewis knocked out Daukaus in round 1 at UFC Fight Night 199 in December 2021 to break the UFC record for most knockouts in history. The finish moved Lewis past the previous record and cemented his status as the most prolific finisher in UFC heavyweight history.

Question: Who did Daniel Cormier submit in the second round to defend his heavyweight title at UFC 230?
Fact: Cormier submitted Lewis via rear naked choke in round 2 at UFC 230 in November 2018, making his first heavyweight title defense in the main event at Madison Square Garden. Lewis had looked dangerous early before Cormier dragged him to the mat and worked for the finish.

Question: Who is the only fighter to defeat Derek Brunson twice?
Fact: Jacare Souza defeated Brunson twice — first at Strikeforce: Barnett vs. Kharitonov in 2011 and again at UFC 208 in February 2017 — making him the only fighter to beat Brunson twice. Despite the second win, Brunson went on to become a top middleweight contender.

Question: Which fighter is nicknamed Bruce Leeroy?
Fact: Caceres earned the nickname Bruce Leeroy for his flashy, creative striking style reminiscent of martial arts movie characters. The featherweight has had a long UFC career known for exciting performances and unorthodox techniques.

Question: What fighter put a halt to Dustin Poirier's four-fight win streak, upsetting the future champion via first-round knockout at UFC Fight Night 94?
Fact: Johnson knocked out Poirier in round 1 at UFC Fight Night 94 in September 2016, one of the biggest upsets in lightweight history that year. Poirier had been on a four-fight winning streak and was considered a top contender before the loss.

Question: What fighter joined the UFC in 2019, rattled off seven consecutive wins, with back-to-back stoppage wins coming over Cub Swanson and Edson Barboza?
Fact: Chikadze made an immediate impact after joining the UFC in 2019, going 7-0 with highlight-reel finishes of Swanson and Barboza. His Muay Thai-based striking made him one of the most dangerous featherweights in the promotion before losing to Calvin Kattar.

Question: What fighter joined the UFC in 2017, defeated Rashad Colter, Cyril Asker, and Andrei Arlovski, but saw his undefeated record come to an end against Junior Dos Santos at UFC Fight Night 142?
Fact: Tuivasa made a strong start to his UFC career going 5-0 before losing to JDS at UFC Fight Night 142 in December 2018. Despite the loss, he rebuilt his career and became one of the most popular fighters on the roster with his entertaining personality and powerful striking.

Question: What fighter defeated Silvana Gomez Juarez via submission at UFC Vegas 39, then seven days later made the quickest turnaround in UFC history when she fought Luana Carolina at UFC Vegas 40?
Fact: Godinez set the record for quickest turnaround in UFC history by fighting just seven days apart — submitting Juarez at UFC Vegas 39 and then returning to face Carolina at UFC Vegas 40 in October 2021. Her willingness to fight on such short notice became one of the most remarkable stories of that UFC stretch.

Question: Which fighter is nicknamed The Future?
Fact: Garry earned his Future nickname to reflect his potential as the next great Irish UFC fighter and future welterweight champion.

Question: What fighter is 20-1, with the lone loss coming against Merab Dvalishvili at UFC 311?
Fact: Umar, the cousin of Khabib Nurmagomedov, compiled a near-perfect record before his first loss came against Dvalishvili at UFC 311. His grappling-heavy style and finishing ability made him one of the most feared bantamweight prospects in the sport.

Question: Who did Ian Garry defeat by lopsided unanimous decision at UFC 292, with one judge even scoring the bout 30-24?
Fact: Garry dominated Magny to remain unbeaten in the UFC at UFC 292, with one judge scoring it an extraordinary 30-24 reflecting his complete control of the fight. The win continued Garry's rise through the welterweight division.

Question: Who did Matt Hughes defeat to make his second UFC welterweight title defense in his second title reign at UFC 52?
Fact: Hughes defeated Trigg by rear naked choke in round 1 at UFC 52 in his second title reign, one of the most memorable finishes of his career. Trigg had rocked Hughes early and nearly submitted him before Hughes escaped, took him down, and finished him dramatically.

Question: What former EliteXC lightweight champion defeated Sam Stout by TKO in 30 seconds at TUF Nations Finale: Bisping vs. Kennedy?
Fact: Noons stopped Stout in just 30 seconds at the TUF Nations Finale to demonstrate the finishing power that made him EliteXC lightweight champion. Noons also holds notable wins over Nick Diaz and Yves Edwards throughout his career.

Question: What fighter, who later fought Paddy Pimblett, debuted at UFC Vegas 16, defeating Matt Wiman in 22 seconds via a slam knockout?
Fact: Leavitt announced himself with a stunning slam knockout of Wiman in just 22 seconds at UFC Vegas 16 in February 2021. He later faced Paddy Pimblett, becoming one of the fighters associated with the rising Irish star's UFC tenure.

Question: Before winning fourteen consecutive fights in the UFC, Merab Dvalishvili lost his UFC debut to Frankie Saenz and the next fight to whom via technical submission at UFC Fight Night 128?
Fact: Dvalishvili lost his first two UFC fights — his debut to Saenz and then to Simon via technical submission at UFC Fight Night 128 — before going on a remarkable 14-fight winning streak that brought him the UFC bantamweight title. His turnaround is one of the most impressive in UFC history.

Question: A Brazilian military police officer, what fighter debuted at UFC 95, knocking out Josh Koscheck in round one?
Fact: Thiago pulled off one of the biggest upsets in welterweight history at UFC 95 in February 2009, knocking out the heavily favored Koscheck in round 1. His background as a Brazilian military police officer added to the mystique of the shocking debut performance.

Question: Who did Nate Diaz submit in his return fight at UFC 279 after a long absence from the UFC?
Fact: Diaz submitted Ferguson with a rear naked choke in the fourth round at UFC 279 in his final UFC fight before his contract expired ending his long career with the promotion on a victorious note.

Question: Who is the only fighter to defeat Chael Sonnen three times?
Fact: Horn defeated Sonnen three times across their career spanning regional shows and Strikeforce — making him the only fighter to beat Sonnen three times. Sonnen's two losses to Anderson Silva are better known, but Horn holds the record for most wins over him.

Question: Which fighter is nicknamed The Outlaw?
Fact: Hardy earned The Outlaw nickname for his rebellious personality and aggressive never-back-down fighting style that made him one of the most popular welterweights of his era.

Question: Which fighter is nicknamed Triple C?
Fact: Cejudo earned the nickname 'Triple C' — standing for Cejudo, Champion, Champ — after simultaneously holding the UFC flyweight and bantamweight titles. He also held an Olympic gold medal, making him a triple champion in combat sports.

Question: What undefeated fighter, who had won six UFC fights with the last coming via TKO over Alex Perez, did Brandon Royval defeat via split decision at UFC Vegas 98?
Fact: Taira had gone undefeated through six UFC fights before Royval handed him his first professional loss via split decision at UFC Vegas 98. The loss was a significant upset given Taira's dominant run through the flyweight division.

Question: What fighter won his first five UFC fights, with big wins over Raphael Assuncao and John Lineker, but lost a title eliminator to Aljamain Sterling via submission at UFC 250?
Fact: Sandhagen went 5-0 in the UFC with impressive wins before Sterling submitted him in round 1 at UFC 250 in June 2020 to earn the title shot. Despite the loss, Sandhagen remained one of the top bantamweight contenders for years after.

Question: Released after going 3-3-1 in his first UFC stint, what fighter has won eight consecutive fights, five coming during his second UFC run?
Fact: Zalal went 3-3-1 in his first UFC stint before being released, then rebuilt his career and returned to the UFC for a second run where he went on a remarkable winning streak. His turnaround is one of the more impressive second-chance stories in recent UFC history.

Question: Which fighter is nicknamed Karate Hottie?
Fact: Waterson earned her nickname as a female karate practitioner who combined her striking skills with effective grappling in the strawweight division.

Question: Who did Robbie Lawler defeat in 38 seconds via TKO in his retirement fight at UFC 290?
Fact: Lawler went out on his own terms at UFC 290 in July 2023, stopping Price with punches in just 38 seconds in what he announced as his retirement fight. It was a fitting send-off for one of the most beloved and exciting welterweights in UFC history.

Question: What fighter, who bounced around at welterweight and middleweight, saw an eight-fight win streak snap against Anthony Hernandez at UFC Vegas 99?
Fact: Pereira had gone on an eight-fight winning streak bouncing between welterweight and middleweight before Hernandez ended it at UFC Vegas 99. His flashy, acrobatic fighting style made him one of the most entertaining fighters on the roster throughout his run.

Question: What fighter debuted at UFC Fight Island 1 with a submission victory over John Phillips, and then ten days later turned around and defeated Rhys McKee via TKO at UFC Fight Island 3?
Fact: Chimaev made history by completing two UFC fights in just ten days in July 2020 — submitting Phillips at UFC Fight Island 1 and then TKO'ing McKee at UFC Fight Island 3. The unprecedented back-to-back performances announced him as one of the most extraordinary prospects in UFC history.

Question: What fighter had this four-fight winning streak: KO over Bevon Lewis, Split Decision over Antonio Carlos Junior, TKO over Anderson Silva, and TKO over Chris Weidman?
Fact: Hall went on this remarkable run through the middleweight division, defeating two former UFC champions in Silva and Weidman in succession. The streak was the peak of Hall's UFC career and earned him significant recognition as a legitimate contender.

Question: Who did Steve Erceg fight for the UFC flyweight title at UFC 301?
Fact: Erceg challenged champion Pantoja for the flyweight title at UFC 301 in May 2024 in Rio de Janeiro, losing by unanimous decision. The Australian was a late replacement who impressed despite the loss.

Question: Which fighter is nicknamed The Joker?
Fact: Hermansson earned the nickname The Joker during his UFC career as a top middleweight contender from Sweden. Known for his grappling and well-rounded game, he has faced numerous top middleweights during his time in the UFC.

Question: Jim Miller and Charles Oliveira rank first and second for all-time wins in the UFC — who sits third with 24 victories?
Fact: Magny has compiled 24 UFC wins, placing him third on the all-time wins list behind Miller and Oliveira. The durable welterweight has fought consistently at the top level for over a decade, facing numerous ranked opponents throughout his career.

Question: What undefeated fighter did Jon Jones submit at UFC 126?
Fact: Jones submitted Bader with a guillotine choke in round 1 at UFC 126 in February 2011, ending Bader's undefeated record. The dominant win over the highly-touted Bader earned Jones his light heavyweight title shot against Mauricio Rua two months later at UFC 128.

Question: Who did Jose Aldo defeat to win the WEC featherweight title before bringing it into the UFC?
Fact: Aldo defeated Gamburyan by TKO in round 2 at WEC 44 in November 2009 to win the WEC featherweight championship. When the WEC merged with the UFC in 2010, Aldo brought the title with him and it became the UFC featherweight championship.

Question: What champion made the quickest turnaround in title fights, defeating Alex Perez via submission at UFC 255, and then 21 days later retaining the title in a draw against Brandon Moreno at UFC 256?
Fact: Figueiredo submitted Perez at UFC 255 and then fought Moreno just 21 days later at UFC 256, the quickest turnaround between title fights in UFC history. The Moreno fight ended in a majority draw, allowing Figueiredo to retain the flyweight title before their rematch series.

Question: Who is the only fighter to defeat Rory MacDonald twice?
Fact: Lawler defeated MacDonald twice — first by unanimous decision at UFC 167 in 2013, and then in their epic rematch at UFC 189 in 2015 where Lawler stopped MacDonald with punches in round 5 in one of the greatest fights in UFC history. Their second fight is widely considered one of the best title fights ever.

Question: What active fighter has the longest average fight time at 19:04?
Fact: Shevchenko's dominant title reign and multiple five-round championship fights have given her the longest average fight time among active UFC fighters at 19:04 per fight. Her durability and championship-level performances account for the extraordinary total.

Question: What fighter debuted at UFC Fight Night 64, scoring a shocking submission upset over Joanne Calderwood?
Fact: Moroz pulled off one of the biggest upsets in women's strawweight history at UFC Fight Night 64 in April 2015, submitting Calderwood who was considered a top contender at the time. It was a stunning debut performance that announced Moroz as a serious grappling threat.

Question: Of Roxanne Modafferi's 20 professional losses, who is the only fighter to defeat her twice, with the last win coming at UFC on ESPN 4?
Fact: Maia defeated Modafferi twice in their careers, with the second win coming at UFC on ESPN 4 in July 2019. Modafferi, known as The Happy Warrior, was one of the most beloved fighters in women's MMA despite accumulating losses against the sport's elite.

Question: What fighter defeated Nick Diaz at UFC 57, and then infamously fought him again in the hospital?
Fact: Riggs defeated Diaz by split decision at UFC 57 in February 2006, and the two then infamously got into a brawl in the hospital where both were recovering from their injuries. The incident became one of the most colorful stories in UFC history.

Question: Which fighter is nicknamed The Leech?
Fact: Li Jingliang earned The Leech nickname for his smothering pressure fighting style that drains opponents of energy throughout the fight.

Question: What fighter, infamous for having a chest hair arrow, opened his UFC career with four consecutive wins, including a memorable debut victory over Chris Lytle at UFC 127?
Fact: Ebersole became famous for his distinctive chest hair shaved into an arrow pointing downward, becoming one of the UFC's most recognizable characters. He debuted at UFC 127 in February 2011 with a split decision win over the fan-favorite Lytle, going on to win his first four UFC fights.

Question: What unbeaten fighter did Carlos Condit defeat in the first round via a flying knee at UFC 132?
Fact: Condit knocked out the undefeated Kim with a spectacular flying knee in round 1 at UFC 132 in July 2011. Kim had been one of the most hyped undefeated prospects in the welterweight division before the stunning finish ended his perfect record.

Question: Who did Jon Jones stop by TKO at UFC 197 in his return fight after being stripped of the title?
Fact: Jones defeated Saint Preux by TKO at UFC 197 in his comeback fight after being stripped of the title showing he had lost nothing during his time away from the octagon.

Question: What fighter moved up to Middleweight and later won the title, after suffering a TKO loss at welterweight against Stephen Thompson at UFC 170?
Fact: Whittaker lost to Thompson via TKO at UFC 170 in his final welterweight fight before moving up to middleweight. The move proved inspired as Whittaker went on a remarkable run at 185 pounds, eventually winning the UFC middleweight title at UFC 213.

Question: Which fighter is nicknamed Stun Gun?
Fact: Kim earned the nickname Stun Gun for his powerful striking and ability to stun opponents. The South Korean welterweight was one of the most dangerous fighters in the division during his UFC tenure, known for his powerful hands and wrestling.

Question: What fighter injured his knee and was defeated in a Middleweight title fight against Anderson Silva at UFC 90?
Fact: Cote suffered a knee injury during his UFC 90 title fight against Silva in October 2008 and was unable to continue, with Silva winning by TKO. Despite the unfortunate circumstances, Cote had given Silva a competitive fight before the injury ended his title challenge.

Question: What fighter stunned the undefeated Mirsad Bektic, who was about to secure another victory, winning by third-round knockout at UFC 209?
Fact: Elkins was being dominated by the undefeated Bektic and appeared on the verge of being finished before turning the tables with a stunning third-round knockout at UFC 209 in March 2017. The comeback KO was one of the most dramatic finishes in featherweight history.

Question: Who did Royce Gracie defeat in the final of UFC 2 to win his second consecutive UFC tournament?
Fact: Gracie submitted Patrick Smith with a rear naked choke in the final of UFC 2 completing a sweep of all three UFC 2 bouts in one night to claim his second tournament victory.

Question: Which fighter is nicknamed The Dream Catcher?
Fact: Mousasi earned the nickname The Dream Catcher during his career, reflecting his fighting style and finishing ability. The Dutch-Armenian fighter competed at the highest levels in Pride, Strikeforce, UFC, and Bellator, becoming one of the most accomplished middleweights of his generation.

Question: What former middleweight champion did Cung Le knock out at UFC on Fuel TV 6, which also happened to be his last MMA fight?
Fact: Le knocked out Franklin in round 1 at UFC on Fuel TV 6 in November 2012, ending Franklin's career. It was a shocking finish as Le uncorked a vicious left hook that put the former middleweight champion down for the final time in his professional career.

Question: What fighter was 0-3 in UFC heavyweight title fights, losing to Kevin Randleman and Randy Couture twice?
Fact: Rizzo challenged for the UFC heavyweight title three times without success — losing to Randleman at UFC 26 and then to Couture twice at UFC 31 and UFC 34. Despite never winning the title, he was considered one of the most dangerous strikers in heavyweight history during his prime.

Question: Who did Brendan Allen defeat by submission at UFC Fight Night 220 to earn consecutive victories over top middleweight contenders?
Fact: Allen submitted Curtis at UFC Fight Night 220 to continue his impressive run in the middleweight division establishing himself as a serious contender with his technical ground game.

Question: Who did Valentina Shevchenko dominate to make her sixth UFC flyweight title defense at UFC 266?
Fact: Shevchenko dominated Murphy over five rounds at UFC 266 to make her sixth consecutive flyweight title defense cementing her legacy as the most dominant women's flyweight champion in UFC history.

Question: Which fighter is nicknamed The Horror?
Fact: Story earned the nickname The Horror during his UFC welterweight career, known for his tough, grinding wrestling-based style. He compiled an impressive record against quality competition during his UFC tenure.

Question: What former Bellator fighter did Lerone Murphy stop in the opening round to remain unbeaten at UFC 319?
Fact: Murphy stopped Pico in the opening round at UFC 319 to remain unbeaten in his professional MMA career. Pico was a highly touted Bellator prospect who had a record of 10-3 before signing with the UFC.

Question: Who did Drew Dober knock out with a left hand at UFC 326?
Fact: Dober knocked out Johnson with a left hand in round 1 at UFC 326, earning a Performance of the Night bonus. The finish was one of Dober's most impressive as he continued to establish himself as one of the most dangerous lightweights on the roster.

Question: Who is the only fighter to defeat Ryan Spann twice, with the second win coming at UFC Fight Night 225?
Fact: Smith defeated Spann twice during their light heavyweight rivalry — once in their first meeting and again at UFC Fight Night 225. The second win was particularly satisfying for Smith as he avenged any doubt from their first encounter.

Question: Coming off winning the inaugural WEC Heavyweight Championship, what fighter defeated Wes Sims by knockout at UFC 47 in his UFC debut?
Fact: Kyle had won the inaugural WEC Heavyweight Championship before making his UFC debut at UFC 47 in April 2004, knocking out Wes Sims in the first round. Despite the impressive debut, Kyle had a difficult UFC career and is perhaps best remembered for his controversial foul against James Irvin.

Question: Which fighter is nicknamed Salsa Boy?
Fact: Cortes-Acosta earned the nickname Salsa Boy, adding to his colorful personality as a Dominican heavyweight in the UFC. Known for his powerful hands, he became one of the more exciting heavyweight prospects on the roster.

Question: Randy Couture's last MMA victory came at UFC 118 against what debuting fighter?
Fact: Couture submitted boxer James Toney with a rear naked choke in the first round at UFC 118. Toney was a world champion boxer making his MMA debut, and Couture took him down immediately and choked him out in 3:19 of round one.

Question: Who did Urijah Faber upset in what would be his final MMA victory at UFC Fight Night: de Randamie vs. Ladd?
Fact: Faber came out of retirement to defeat Simon by TKO in the first round at UFC Fight Night: de Randamie vs. Ladd in December 2019. It was his final professional MMA fight and he announced his retirement immediately after the victory.

Question: What fighter upset an undefeated Todd Duffee, winning by third-round knockout at UFC 114?
Fact: Russow pulled off one of the biggest heavyweight upsets in recent UFC history at UFC 114 in May 2010, knocking out the highly touted Duffee in round 3 with a short right hand. Duffee had been considered a future champion candidate before the stunning loss.

Question: Who is the only fighter to hold wins over Glover Teixeira, Jan Blachowicz, and Ryan Bader?
Fact: Anderson holds victories over three fighters who all went on to win major light heavyweight titles — Teixeira (UFC), Blachowicz (UFC), and Bader (Bellator). It is one of the most impressive sets of wins in light heavyweight history even if Anderson never captured a title himself.

Question: What fighter rattled off seven consecutive wins, but fell short in a title fight at UFC 315 against Valentina Shevchenko?
Fact: Fiorot went unbeaten in the UFC on a seven-fight winning streak before challenging Shevchenko for the flyweight title at UFC 315. Despite the loss, the French fighter established herself as one of the top flyweights in the world during her run.

Question: Which UFC heavyweight earned the nickname The Skyscraper?
Fact: Struve earned the nickname The Skyscraper due to his 7-foot height, making him the tallest fighter in UFC history. The Dutch heavyweight had notable wins over Mark Hunt and Antonio Rodrigo Nogueira during his UFC career.

Question: What fighter stormed into the UFC, earned a title shot after four consecutive wins via TKO, and defeated Randy Couture via TKO to win the vacant heavyweight championship at UFC 39?
Fact: Rodriguez defeated Couture by TKO in round 3 at UFC 39 in September 2002 to win the vacant heavyweight championship. He had earned the shot with four consecutive TKO victories and the win over the decorated Couture was the peak of his UFC career.

Question: What fighter scored the fastest knockout in light heavyweight division history in his UFC debut against Anthony Perosh at UFC 149?
Fact: Jimmo knocked out Perosh in just 7 seconds at UFC 149 in July 2012, setting the record for the fastest knockout in UFC light heavyweight history. The shocking speed of the finish immediately made Jimmo one of the most anticipated new additions to the division.

Question: Who was the first Brazilian born fighter to win the undisputed UFC heavyweight championship?
Fact: Werdum knocked out Cain Velasquez in round 1 at UFC 188 in Mexico City to win the undisputed UFC heavyweight title. Antonio Rodrigo Nogueira had previously held the interim UFC heavyweight title, making 'undisputed' an important distinction.

Question: Which fighter is nicknamed The Train?
Fact: Landwehr earned the nickname The Train for his relentless, aggressive fighting style and non-stop pressure. The featherweight became known as one of the most exciting fighters on the UFC roster with his willingness to engage in brawls.

Question: Who did Paddy Pimblett defeat by controversial unanimous decision at UFC 282 to remain unbeaten in the UFC?
Fact: Pimblett defeated Gordon by unanimous decision at UFC 282 in December 2022 in a fight most observers felt Gordon had won. The controversial scorecards became one of the most talked-about judging decisions of the year, with many feeling Gordon deserved the nod.

Question: What fighter has recorded the most knockdowns all-time in UFC history?
Fact: Cerrone holds the UFC record for most knockdowns in history, a testament to his aggressive fighting style and finishing ability across multiple weight classes. The fan-favorite competed more times than almost any other fighter in UFC history, accumulating the record over his lengthy career.

Question: Known for the heel hook, what fighter was suspended several times and ultimately released by the UFC after UFC Fight Night 29 for not letting go of submissions?
Fact: Palhares was one of the most feared submission artists in UFC history but repeatedly drew suspensions for holding submissions after opponents tapped. His release after UFC Fight Night 29 in October 2013 came after he held a heel hook on Mike Pierce long after the tap, ending his UFC tenure.

Question: Debuting at UFC 100, what fighter defeated Alan Belcher by split decision?
Fact: Akiyama made his UFC debut at the historic UFC 100 card in July 2009, defeating Belcher by split decision in a middleweight bout. Despite the controversial win, Akiyama went on to have a rocky UFC career before departing the promotion.

Question: Which fighter is nicknamed The Snowman?
Fact: Monson earned the nickname The Snowman during his UFC career as a fearsome heavyweight grappler known for his submission skills. The heavily tattooed fighter was also known for his outspoken political views and competed at the highest level of heavyweight MMA.

Question: What fighter, who had a win over Conor McGregor at Cage Warriors, joined the UFC in 2015?
Fact: Duffy defeated McGregor at Cage Warriors before both moved to the UFC, making his win over the future two-division champion one of the most noteworthy results in regional MMA history. Duffy joined the UFC in 2015 with significant expectations due to his win over McGregor.

Question: What undefeated fighter, famous for his guillotine choke and fighting in gym shorts, had his perfect record ended by Yves Edwards via submission at UFC Fight for the Troops 2?
Fact: McKenzie built a reputation for his guillotine choke and his unconventional choice to fight in gym shorts rather than traditional MMA shorts. Edwards submitted him at UFC Fight for the Troops 2 in January 2011, ending his undefeated record in one of the more memorable undercard finishes of that era.

Question: With over 100 career victories, what fighter lost to Mark Coleman for the inaugural UFC heavyweight championship?
Fact: Severn, one of the most decorated wrestlers in MMA history, faced Coleman at UFC 11.5 for the inaugural UFC heavyweight title and lost. Severn had over 100 career MMA victories and was an Olympic alternate in Greco-Roman wrestling.

Question: What former KSW fighter stormed into the UFC with six consecutive wins, beating the likes of Lorenz Larkin and Costas Philippou, before losing to Ronaldo Souza at UFC Fight Night 36?
Fact: Carmont came to the UFC on the back of his KSW success and impressed with six straight wins over quality middleweight competition. His run ended with a loss to Souza at UFC Fight Night 36 in February 2014, but he remained a respected middleweight competitor.
